title: SMART CLINIC CHAIR WITH PATIENT USING VI
Sales Assistant
description:
About us: 

EMRG is an award-winning Digital Marketing Agency based in Los Angeles. With a team of experienced professionals for each service line, we offer a wide range of digital marketing solutions that are customized to meet the unique needs of each client. We are renowned for our outstanding customer service and ability to deliver exceptional `results. As a leading agency in the industry, we have established ourselves as a reliable partner for businesses looking to grow and expand their online presence.

As our company continues to grow, we are also committed to expanding our philanthropic goals and supporting children in need worldwide.



Job Title: Remote Sales Assistant - Digital Marketing



Job Description:

As a Remote Sales Assistant in the digital marketing industry, you will play a vital role in supporting the sales team and ensuring the smooth operation of the digital marketing sales process. Your primary responsibility will be to assist with various sales tasks, including lead generation, client communication, and sales administration. Working remotely, you will collaborate closely with the sales team and other stakeholders to drive sales growth and meet revenue targets.



Responsibilities:

Lead Generation:  Conduct research and identify potential clients through various online platforms: social media channels, Linked IN, Sales Navigator, and industry databases. Initiating Outbound outreach (outbound calls and sending outbound
). Collect and organize relevant information, such as contact details and company profiles, for further outreach.



Client Communication: Communicate with prospective clients via
, phone, or online messaging platforms. Introduce the company's digital marketing services, answer inquiries, and schedule appointments or product demonstrations.



Sales Support: Assist the sales team in preparing sales presentations, proposals, and contracts. Coordinate with internal teams, such as marketing and creative departments, to gather necessary materials and ensure timely delivery to clients.



CRM Management: Utilize customer relationship management (CRM) software to maintain accurate and up-to-date client records, track sales activities, and generate reports. Monitor and update the sales pipeline to reflect the progress of leads and opportunities.



Relationship Building: Foster positive and long-lasting relationships with clients, acting as a reliable point of contact. Provide exceptional customer service, address concerns, and identify opportunities to upsell or cross-sell additional digital marketing services.



Market Research: Stay informed about industry trends, competitor activities, and emerging digital marketing strategies. Share relevant insights with the sales team to refine sales approaches and stay ahead in the competitive market.



Sales Administration: Perform administrative tasks, such as data entry, document management, and sales performance tracking. Assist with the organization and coordination of sales events, trade shows, and webinars.



Requirements:

Proven experience as a sales assistant or in a similar sales support role.

Legal Marketing Experience is a plus

Able to quickly capture and summarize notes

Highly organized, Can manage tasks, deadlines, and follow-ups efficiently.

Understands client needs and project scope with ease.

Fluent, with a neutral accent preferred (but not required) for clear communication

Experience in digital marketing concepts and practices.

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.

Proficiency in using CRM software and other sales-related tools.

Self-motivated and able to work effectively in a remote work environment.

Attention to detail and ability to maintain accurate records.

Knowledge of market research techniques is a plus.



Join our dynamic digital marketing team as a Remote Sales Assistant and contribute to our mission of helping businesses achieve their marketing goals through innovative digital strategies.

title: Experienced B2B Cold Caller - Work EST Daytime - Stable Hours
description:
We are looking for a reliable and professional B2B Cold Caller / Appointment Setter to contact businesses and introduce our services.

We pay base hourly rate + commission per booking.

Your main responsibility will be to speak with DMs and schedule appointments for our team.

This is a remote position requiring strong communication skills, discipline, and professionalism.

Must be available to work during EST Eastern Time (Toronto)

MUST have at least 1 year of experience in B2B cold calling.

Responsibilities



• Make outbound cold calls to businesses using a provided call list

• Introduce our services using a provided script

• Speak with decision-makers and gatekeepers professionally

• Schedule appointments with qualified prospects

• Update CRM / Google Sheets with call outcomes and notes

• Maintain accurate records of calls and follow-ups

• Additional time for data scraping and/or data entry may be required



Requirements

• Minimum 1 year of cold calling experience

• High motivation to work & succeed

• Strong spoken & written English communication skills

• Comfortable speaking with business owners and decision-makers

• Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace & an internet backup

• Organized and detail-oriented - worksheet organized

• Ability to follow scripts and procedures

• Must be available to work during Eastern Time (Toronto)



Work Schedule

• 4 hours per day, 5 times a week.

• Work must be performed during EST Toronto Eastern Time business hours



Work Setup

• Remote work

• Training and scripts will be provided

• Calls are monitored and recorded for quality assurance

• Time tracking software with screenshots is used during working hours





How to Apply:

Please follow these instructions carefully. Applications that do not follow them will not be reviewed.

Start your message with:



1. Your full name and



2. Confirm your availability:

   “I am available to work EST part-time”



3. Brief experience summary (max 3–4 lines):



* What industry did you do B2B cold calling in?

* How long?

* What were you responsible for (appointments, sales, etc.)?



4. Real call examples:



* What would you say to a gatekeeper to get transferred to the decision maker?

* Once speaking to the decision maker, what would your opening line be?



5. Quick thinking:

If the decision maker says: “We already have someone”, how would you respond?



Shortlisted candidates will be asked to sent a short video be
 then be invited for a short interview.

title: Client Success Manager
description:
Triforce Digital Marketing, a leading company in DIgital Marketing is seeking a dynamic and driven individual to join our team as an Account Manager. As an Account Manager, you will play a crucial role in fostering and maintaining strong relationships with our clients, ensuring their satisfaction and maximizing their value from our products/services.



Responsibilities:



Client Communication: Act as the primary point of contact for assigned clients, ensuring effective and timely communication. Listen actively to clients' needs, concerns, and feedback, and provide appropriate solutions or escalate to the relevant departments within the organization.



Relationship Management: Build and nurture long-term relationships with clients, establishing a deep understanding of their business goals and challenges. Serve as a trusted advisor, offering strategic insights and recommendations to help clients achieve their objectives.



Account Growth: Identify opportunities for account expansion and growth by upselling additional products or services that align with clients' needs.



Customer Success: Monitor clients' satisfaction levels and proactively address any issues or concerns to ensure high customer retention. Work closely with cross-functional teams, including customer support and product development, to deliver exceptional service and exceed client expectations.



Reporting and Analysis: Track and analyze key account metrics, such as revenue growth, client retention, and product adoption rates. Prepare regular reports and present findings to the management team, providing insights and recommendations for improvement.



Requirements:



Experience: Minimum of 1-2 years of experience in account management, client services, or a related field. Prior experience in marketing is highly desirable.



Strong Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills to effectively engage with clients, understand their requirements, and convey information in a clear and concise manner.



Relationship Building: Proven ability to build and maintain strong relationships with clients, understanding their business needs and challenges, and offering solutions that drive mutual success.



Strategic Thinking: Ability to think strategically and identify opportunities for account growth and expansion. Demonstrated experience in developing account plans and executing strategies to achieve revenue targets.



Problem-Solving: Strong problem-solving skills to address client issues or concerns effectively and find appropriate resolutions. Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple client accounts simultaneously.



Analytical Skills: Proficient in analyzing data and using insights to drive decision-making. Experience in preparing reports, analyzing metrics, and presenting findings to stakeholders.



Team Player: Collaborative mindset with the ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams and leverage internal resources to deliver exceptional customer service.

title: Experienced Cold Caller | Base Pay + Weekly Bonuses
description:
We are specifically looking for experienced roofing sales callers.



We’re a US-based roofing company expanding our call center and hiring cold callers with roofing, solar, or closely related sales experience who can actually communicate—not just read scripts.



You will be provided scripts and structure—but your success depends on your ability to sound natural, control conversations, and engage US homeowners.



If you can take a script and make it feel like a real conversation, this role offers consistent hours, clear pay growth, and strong bonus potential.



?



Compensation:

 • Base Pay: $3/hour

 • 2+ sales per pay period: $4/hour

 • 4+ sales per pay period: $5/hour

 • $25 bonus per sale



Most reps hit 2+ sales weekly ($4/hour + $50+ bonuses). Top performers reach $5/hour + $100+ weekly bonuses.



?



Schedule:

 • 40 hours/week

 • Monday–Friday: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM CST

 • 1-hour unpaid lunch

 • Optional Saturdays: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST



?



Who This Is For



We are not looking for robotic script readers.



We are looking for reps who can:

 • Use a script without sounding scripted

 • Carry a natural, back-and-forth conversation

 • Ask questions and keep prospects talking

 • Handle objections without freezing or defaulting to the script

 • Build quick rapport with US homeowners



?



Requirements:

 • Excellent English fluency

 • Natural American accent

 • Minimum 1 year cold calling experience

 • Roofing, solar, or real estate campaign experience strongly preferred



If you rely on reading line-by-line without adapting to the conversation, this role is not a fit.



?



Application Requirements



To be considered, send a 30-second video covering:

 • Your cold calling experience

 • Your experience using scripts on live calls

 • Your roofing or related campaign experience

 • Your availability for a 9:00 AM CST interview



We’re interviewing daily at 9:00 AM CST and hiring immediately.



?



If you can turn a script into a real conversation—and consistently convert calls into opportunities—we want to talk.



— Graham

Roofing Solutions

title: Interim Operations Manager (UK time)
description:
The Interim Operations Manager is responsible for overseeing the day-to-day operational delivery of jobs across the platform, ensuring work is completed efficiently, to a high standard, and in a way that maximises job revenue.



The role focuses on job coordination, service quality, contractor management, invoicing accuracy, and complaints handling. The Interim Operations Manager will also support and oversee the Operations Assistant to ensure daily operational tasks are completed effectively.



While the role involves ensuring jobs are correctly invoiced and processed, responsibility for chasing outstanding payments sits outside of this role.



Key Responsibilities:



**Daily Job Operations**

*Oversee the lifecycle of jobs from booking through to completion.

*Ensure jobs are allocated to appropriate tradespeople based on skillset, location, and availability.

*Monitor active jobs to ensure timely completion and minimal disruption to customers.

*Resolve operational issues that may impact job delivery.

*Manage and Order materials for in-house team where appropriate.



**Service Quality**

*Monitor completed jobs to ensure work meets company standards and customer expectations.

*Address performance issues with tradespeople such as lateness, cancellations, or quality concerns.

*Maintain strong communication with contractors to ensure professional service delivery.



**Complaints Handling**

*Take ownership of customer complaints relating to job delivery or service quality.

*Investigate issues by reviewing job details and speaking with relevant tradespeople.

*Provide fair and practical resolutions while maintaining customer satisfaction and protecting the platform’s reputation.

*Identify recurring issues and implement improvements to reduce future complaints.



**Invoicing & Job Administration**

*Ensure jobs are accurately recorded and invoiced following completion.

*Review job details to confirm correct scope, pricing, and information before invoices are issued.

*Work with the relevant team to ensure invoices are processed correctly, while responsibility for chasing outstanding payments sits elsewhere.



**Revenue & Job Efficiency**

*Manage scheduling and job allocation to maximise job completion and revenue opportunities ie; quotes conversions and markup.

*Reduce failed jobs, cancellations, and wasted booking slots.Identify opportunities to improve job value and operational efficiency.



**Team Support & Coordination**

*Support and oversee the Operations Assistant in daily operational tasks.

*Delegate tasks where appropriate while ensuring platform updates and job records remain accurate.

*Maintain an efficient workflow across the operations team.

*Allow for future hires in recruiting operation assistants.

*Weekly reporting of feedback to senior management on weekly summaries and feedback.



**Operational Improvements**

*Identify inefficiencies in operational processes and suggest improvements where appropriate.



**Decision Authority**

*The Interim Operations Manager is trusted to make day-to-day operational decisions to ensure jobs run smoothly and customers receive a high level of service.



This includes authority to:

*Reallocate or reschedule jobs where necessary to ensure completion.

*Assign or change tradespeople based on availability, suitability, or 
vestigate and respond to customer complaints relating to job delivery or quality.

*Coordinate job revisits or corrective work where appropriate to resolve service issues.

*Manage and Order materials for in-house team where appropriate.

*Address performance concerns with tradespeople where service standards are not met and escalating to senior management.

*Escalation to senior management should occur where there are significant financial implications, reputational risks, unresolved disputes, or serious contractor conduct concerns.



We believe this role provides clearer structure around operational responsibilities and decision-making, and we look forward to continuing to work together as the business grows.



Work Schedule:

UK Time

Better schedule/flexibility



To apply, PLEASE submit your CV/Resume as well as a vocaroo voice recording detailing your experience.

title: Fluent English Customer & Admin Support Specialist (Voice/Tickets/CRM)
description:
About the Role:



We are looking for a reliable, highly skilled Virtual Assistant to join our team long-term in a hybrid role. In this position, you will wear two hats. First, you will be the frontline voice and face of our company, handling customer inquiries with empathy and professionalism. Second, you will be our behind-the-scenes organizer, processing orders and managing our CRM to keep our business running smoothly.



If you love helping people solve problems but also enjoy checking items off a to-do list and organizing data, this is the perfect role for you.



Part 1: Customer Support Responsibilities



Voice Support: Handle inbound and outbound customer calls to answer questions, troubleshoot issues, and provide excellent service.



Ticket Management: Read, investigate, and reply to customer support tickets with impeccable grammar and a friendly tone.



Problem Solving: Investigate customer complaints, figure out what went wrong, and provide fair, timely resolutions.



Part 2: Administrative & Operations Responsibilities



Order Entry: Accurately input customer orders and process them through our system.



CRM Management: Update customer records, track issues, and manage data within [GoHighLevel., Zendesk, Shopify, HubSpot]. We are developing our own CRM, but you must have experience with management software.



General Admin: Assist with daily back-office tasks, maintain spreadsheets, and help keep our operations organized.



What You Need to Succeed:



Impeccable English: You must have C1/C2 advanced spoken English with a neutral accent, and flawless written grammar.



The "Hybrid" Mindset: The ability to switch gears quickly from talking to a frustrated customer to quietly executing detailed order entry.



Tech-Savvy: Quick to learn new software and comfortable navigating CRM platforms.



Strict Technical & Workspace Requirements:

Because you will be speaking with customers on the phone, a professional environment is non-negotiable. You must have:



A dedicated, quiet workspace with absolutely ZERO background noise (no dogs, roosters, or street traffic).



A professional-grade, noise-canceling headset (e.g., Jabra, Plantronics).



A wired, high-speed internet connection (Minimum 25 Mbps).



A reliable backup internet connection and a backup power source in case of brownouts.



Work Hours & Compensation:



Schedule: Forty hours a week, from 8 am PST to 4 pm PST.



Pay: $500 - $900month], depending on experience.



How to Apply:

We only hire people with excellent attention to detail. To prove you have read this entire post and can follow instructions, please do not use a standard copy-paste application. Instead:



Change the subject line of your application message to: Blue Penguin - [Your Name]



In the very first sentence of your cover letter, tell us the name of your favorite movie.



Include a link to a short voice recording (using Vocaroo or a similar tool) introducing yourself and explaining why you are a great fit for this hybrid role. This is required so we can hear your spoken English and verify there is no background noise in your workspace.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will be automatically deleted. We look forward to meeting you!

title: DEDICATED Full-Time premier pro Video Editor & Marketing Specialist
description:
DEDICATED Full-Time premier pro Video Editor & Marketing Specialist



(High Salary Growth · with Huge Performance Bonuses · Long-Term Role)



No Beginners — Only Serious, Skilled Editors Apply



We are hiring a full-time, highly skilled premier pro video editor & marketing-focused creative who understands viral video creation at a deep level and can produce multiple high-quality, high-retention videos every single day.



This role is for someone who wants to grow with a team, build a long-term career, and be rewarded heavily for performance. The better your videos perform, the more you earn.



This is a highly rewarded role with massive long-term income potential for the right individual. Including huge extra benefits for top loyal perfomers





What We’re Looking For



We want a serious, dedicated editor who:

• Understands how viral videos work — especially on TikTok, Reels, and modern short-form platforms



• Can produce multiple 4-8 high-quality videos daily using Adobe Premiere Pro



• Has strong marketing instincts and understands how to create “watchable,” high-retention content



• Is motivated to grow their career, earn more, and become a key part of our long-term team

• Is committed, reliable, and consistent with daily output



• Wants a full-time role with massive salary growth opportunities



This position is for professionals only — no beginners, no part-timers, no hobby editors.







Salary & Growth



Starting Range: $500–$1,500/month

(Depending on skills, experience, creativity, and daily output)



• Salary increases are based on your permanent

• Bonuses rewarded for high-performing viral videos

• The more the content grows, the more your salary grows

• Long-term potential for very high monthly pay for top performers

• Travel opportunities and niche-specific projects available as you grow within the company



- To be part of a multinational team that cares about you, and be part of a team not just staff



We only hire people who want a full-time, long-term home — not freelancers jumping from project to project.







???? Your Responsibilities



4-8 videos Daily Video Editing & Production (duration anwher from 10secs to 2 mins+ )



• Produce multiple short-form videos per day for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts



• Edit in Adobe Premiere Pro (non-negotiable)



• Add creative transitions, pacing, captions, sound design, and storytelling



• Create viral-style videos without relying on generic templates



• Improve based on performance data & feedback



Marketing & Creative Strategy

• Work with the team to develop ideas, concepts, and hooks



• Help craft videos that sell, entertain, educate, or retain attention



• Understand how to market a physical product through content



• Be resourceful and solution-oriented with limited footage



• Create scenes using alternative footage, B-roll, and creative storytelling if clips are missing



Collaboration

• Work daily with our team (creators, assistants, strategists)

• Help turn raw ideas into powerful, viral-ready videos

• Bring your own suggestions, creativity, and marketing mind to every project







???? What Makes This Role Unique

• You will help grow a fast-scaling brand with huge global potential

• Long-term, stable, career-building opportunity

• You will have the freedom to grow, lead, and experiment creatively

• Exposure to different niches, products, and video styles

• Uploads of product footage will be provided, but creativity is required — when footage is missing, we adapt and find solutions

• Massive future salary growth for the right editor

• Opportunities to travel with the team as operations expand in couple of months from now



This is a job for someone who wants to build a real career, not just “edit videos.”







Ideal Candidate Profile

• Strong Adobe Premiere Pro skills

• Deep understanding of TikTok/Reels/Shorts virality

• Fast, efficient, and consistent daily editor

• Creative thinker with marketing instincts

• Problem solver who can work with limited footage

• Team player with great communication

• Long-term mindset with the ambition to grow inside the company

• Able to take feedback and improve quickly

• Full-time availability (no other jobs on the side)



 To Apply



Please send:

1. Your best short-form video examples (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

2. A short message explaining your experience with viral content

3. Your expected salary range

4. Confirmation you can work full-time, long-term

5. Your availability and commitment level



?

 Final Note



This is an exciting, high-growth opportunity for a dedicated editor who wants to rise, earn more, and build a powerful career inside a fast-growing company.

If you’re ready to work full-time, produce high-performing videos daily, and grow with a long-term team — we want to hear from you.



Only committed, professional video editors should apply.

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: Cold Caller/Appointment Setter
description:
About us: 

EMRG is an award-winning Digital Marketing Agency based in Los Angeles. With a team of experienced professionals for each service line, we offer a wide range of digital marketing solutions that are customized to meet the unique needs of each client. We are renowned for our outstanding customer service and ability to deliver exceptional `results. As a leading agency in the industry, we have established ourselves as a reliable partner for businesses looking to grow and expand their online presence.

As our company continues to grow, we are also committed to expanding our philanthropic goals and supporting children in need worldwide.



Job Title: Remote Sales Assistant - Digital Marketing



Job Description:

As a Remote Sales Assistant in the digital marketing industry, you will play a vital role in supporting the sales team and ensuring the smooth operation of the digital marketing sales process. Your primary responsibility will be to assist with various sales tasks, including lead generation, client communication, and sales administration. Working remotely, you will collaborate closely with the sales team and other stakeholders to drive sales growth and meet revenue targets.



Responsibilities:

Lead Generation: Conduct research and identify potential clients through various online platforms: social media channels, Linked IN, Sales Navigator, and industry databases. Initiating Outbound outreach (outbound calls and sending outbound
). Collect and organize relevant information, such as contact details and company profiles, for further outreach.



Client Communication: Communicate with prospective clients via
, phone, or online messaging platforms. Introduce the company's digital marketing services, answer inquiries, and schedule appointments or product demonstrations.



Sales Support: Assist the sales team in preparing sales presentations, proposals, and contracts. Coordinate with internal teams, such as marketing and creative departments, to gather necessary materials and ensure timely delivery to clients.



CRM Management: Utilize customer relationship management (CRM) software to maintain accurate and up-to-date client records, track sales activities, and generate reports. Monitor and update the sales pipeline to reflect the progress of leads and opportunities.



Relationship Building: Foster positive and long-lasting relationships with clients, acting as a reliable point of contact. Provide exceptional customer service, address concerns, and identify opportunities to upsell or cross-sell additional digital marketing services.



Market Research: Stay informed about industry trends, competitor activities, and emerging digital marketing strategies. Share relevant insights with the sales team to refine sales approaches and stay ahead in the competitive market.



Sales Administration: Perform administrative tasks, such as data entry, document management, and sales performance tracking. Assist with the organization and coordination of sales events, trade shows, and webinars.



Requirements:

Proven experience as a sales assistant or in a similar sales support role.

Legal Marketing Experience is a plus

Able to quickly capture and summarize notes

Highly organized, Can manage tasks, deadlines, and follow-ups efficiently.

Understands client needs and project scope with ease.

Fluent, with a neutral accent preferred (but not required) for clear communication

Experience in digital marketing concepts and practices.

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.

Proficiency in using CRM software and other sales-related tools.

Self-motivated and able to work effectively in a remote work environment.

Attention to detail and ability to maintain accurate records.

Knowledge of market research techniques is a plus.



Join our dynamic digital marketing team as a Remote Sales Assistant and contribute to our mission of helping businesses achieve their marketing goals through innovative digital strategies.

title: SEO Specialist
description:
Job Title: Remote SEO Specialist

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full-Time



Job Overview:

We are seeking a results-driven SEO Specialist with strong expertise in search engine optimization, keyword strategy, and digital growth. The ideal candidate will be responsible for improving website rankings, increasing organic traffic, and optimizing overall search performance. This role requires hands-on experience in keyword research, on-page and off-page SEO, technical optimization, and performance tracking.

In addition, the candidate should have a creative eye for improving digital assets such as websites, catalogs, and marketing materials. The role will also involve supporting the manager in ensuring virtual employees are assigned daily tasks and meeting performance expectations.



Key Responsibilities:

• Develop and implement effective SEO strategies to improve search rankings and visibility

• Conduct keyword research, competitor analysis, and identify growth opportunities

• Optimize website content, meta tags, images, and site structure for SEO performance

• Execute on-page and off-page SEO, including link-building strategies

• Monitor website performance using tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs

• Analyze traffic, rankings, and user behavior to provide actionable insights

• Collaborate with developers and designers to improve technical SEO and website performance

• Support content creation by ensuring SEO best practices are followed

• Manage local SEO efforts to improve visibility in targeted regions

• Assist with PPC campaigns (Google Ads,
 Ads) when needed

• Stay up to date with SEO trends, algorithm updates, and best practices

• Provide recommendations to improve website design, catalogs, and marketing materials

• Assist in ensuring remote tea
mbers have daily tasks and are meeting objectives



Requirements:

• Proven experience as an SEO Specialist or similar role

• Strong knowledge of SEO tools (Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Moz, Screaming Frog, etc.)

• Solid understanding of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO

• Experience with CMS platforms such as WordPress and Shopify

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Excellent communication and time management skills

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment and meet deadlines

• Willing to work US EST hours (8:30 AM to 5:30 PM, Monday to Friday, with a 1-hour lunch break)

• Willing to use time tracking tools and remote desktop access



Preferred Qualifications:

• Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Digital Media, Business, or related field

• Certifications in Google Analytics, Google Ads, or SEO-related programs

• Experience in e-commerce, B2B, or SaaS industries

• Basic knowledge of graphic design tools (Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva) is a plus



Application Requirements:

If interested, please send the following:

• A link to your resume (PDF or Word format)

• A voice recording introducing yourself

• Your internet speed test result from Speedtest by Ookla



::Note::

Your application will be ignored if these requirements are not submitted.



• Please apply only if you are willing and able to work this schedule

title: Customer Service Manager
description:
Customer Service Manager – DTC Apparel Brand

Location: Remote

Type: Full-Time

Industry: DTC E-commerce / Apparel



What We’re Looking For:

We’re looking for an experienced Customer Service Manager who has previously managed support teams for established DTC brands.

Customer experience is a critical part of our brand, and this role requires someone who understands how high-performing customer support teams operate in fast-growing e-commerce environments.

You will be responsible for leading and managing our customer support team, improving systems and workflows, and ensuring the team consistently delivers high-quality support while maintaining strong operational efficiency.

This is a senior role, and we are specifically looking for someone who has experience managing larger support teams within DTC e-commerce companies.

Experience working with fashion, apparel, or high-volume e-commerce brands is a strong advantage.



Your Role:

You will oversee the entire customer support operation, ensuring the team operates efficiently while delivering excellent customer experiences.



Team Leadership & Management

You will be responsible for leading and managing the customer support team, including:

* overseeing daily support operations

* managing support agents

* improving team workflows

* ensuring high-quality responses and customer satisfaction

You should have experience managing larger support teams and maintaining strong team performance.



Support Systems & Tools

You should be experienced working with modern support systems, such as:

* Zendesk

* Freshdesk

* Gorgias

* or similar customer support platforms

You should understand how to build efficient ticketing systems, workflows, and automation.



KPI Management

You will be responsible for managing and improving customer support KPIs, including:

* response times

* resolution times

* customer satisfaction (CSAT)

* ticket volume management

You should have experience tracking and reporting performance metrics for your team.



Refunds, Exchanges & Operational Efficiency

You should have experience managing refund and exchange processes within DTC brands.

A key part of the role is working on strategies that help:

* reduce unnecessary refunds

* lower exchange rates

* improve customer satisfaction

* optimize operational processes

This requires understanding customer behavior, policies, and internal workflows.



Performance Tracking & Reporting

You will be responsible for tracking team performance and support metrics, including:

* agent productivity

* ticket resolution quality

* response time improvements

* operational efficiency

You should be comfortable building reports and tracking systems that help the team continuously improve.



Required Experience

This role requires proven experience managing customer support teams for DTC brands.

You must have experience with:

* managing customer support teams

* handling high ticket volumes

* customer support systems (Zendesk, Freshdesk, etc.)

* KPI tracking and performance management

* refunds and exchange management

Strong preference for candidates who have worked with:

* fast-scaling DTC brands

* fashion or apparel brands

* high-volume e-commerce businesses



Skills We Value

You should be someone who:

* is highly organized

* leads teams effectively

* understands customer behavior in e-commerce

* can optimize workflows and systems

* focuses on both customer experience and operational efficiency



What We Offer

* Full-time position

* Competitive salary

* Performance-based bonuses

* Work with a fast-growing DTC apparel brand

* Lead and develop a high-performance support team

* Long-term opportunity to grow within the company



How To Apply (Important)

We are looking for detailed applications only.

Your application must include:

1. Your CV

2. A list of DTC brands you have worked with

3. The size of the customer support team you have managed

4. Which customer support systems you have worked with (Zendesk, Freshdesk, etc.)

5. Your strengths as a Customer Service Manager

6. How you have worked to reduce refunds and exchanges

7. How you track and manage team KPIs

8. How you measure and improve support team performance



To confirm you read the full posting, include the word:

"Apperal"

at the end of your application.

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



If you have experience managing high-performing customer support teams for DTC brands, we look forward to hearing from you.

title: Construction CAD Technician/Project Engineer/Estimator
description:
Job Description:

As a Construction CAD Technician/Project Engineer/Estimator, you will play a vital role in ensuring the smooth operation of our construction projects by managing the procurement process. Your responsibilities will include:



1. Creating Submittal Logs: Develop and maintain comprehensive submittal logs to track the submission and approval of all project-related documents.

2. Creating Work Orders: Generate accurate and detailed work orders for subcontractors and suppliers, ensuring all necessary information is included.

3. Creating RFI Logs: Maintain a detailed Request for Information (RFI) log, ensuring all queries and responses are accurately recorded and communicated.

4. Creating accurate Cabinet and Shop Drawings

5. Vendor Management: Identify, evaluate, and manage relationships with suppliers and subcontractors to ensure the timely delivery of high-quality materials and services.

6. Cost Management: Monitor and control project costs by negotiating favorable terms with suppliers, managing budgets, and ensuring cost-effective procurement practices.

7. Inventory Management: Oversee the inventory of construction materials and equipment, ensuring adequate stock levels and minimizing waste.

8. Compliance and Documentation: Ensure all procurement activities comply with relevant regulations and standards. Maintain accurate and up-to-date procurement records and documentation.

9. Collaboration: Work closely with project managers, site superintendents, engineers, and other tea
mbers to align procurement activities with project timelines and requirements.

10. Continuous Improvement: Identify opportunities to improve procurement processes and implement best practices to enhance efficiency and effectiveness.

11. Highly efficient at taking notes during meeting.



Requirements:

- A bachelor’s degree in engineering, architecture, supply chain management, or a similar field is preferred.

- Minimum of 4 years experience in the construction industry.

- Proven experience in construction coordination or a related role.

- Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy to ensure there are no mistakes in procurement activities.

- Strong organizational and time-management skills.

- Excellent negotiation and communication skills. Must be fluent in English (verbal and written).

- Proficiency in procurement software and tools.

- In-depth knowledge of construction materials, equipment, and industry standards.

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.



PLEASE READ & FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS:

If you're ready to take the next step in your construction career, we want to hear from you! To apply, don’t forget to follow these steps:

1.
 with 'HIRE ME - CAD Technician/Project Engineer/Estimator' in the subject line and send to "

title: Strategic Alibaba Sourcing & Procurement Specialist
description:
We are looking for an experienced Sourcing & Procurement Specialist to handle our supply chain operations on Alibaba. Your main goal is to find the best manufacturers, negotiate the best possible terms, and ensure that every product that leaves China meets our high-quality standards.



You will report directly to our Operations Manager and work closely with the CEO.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Supplier Vetting: Identify and verify manufacturers on Alibaba (avoiding trading companies/middlemen).



Negotiation: Negotiate pricing, MOQs (Minimum Order Quantities), and payment terms (aiming for 30/70 splits via Trade Assurance).



Sample Management: Coordinate sample production and shipping to ensure they meet specifications.



Quality Control: Arrange third-party inspections and ensure all production issues are fixed before final payment.



Logistics Coordination: Work with freight forwarders to ensure timely delivery and correct documentation.



Required Qualifications:



Min 2-3 years of experience specifically in Alibaba sourcing for international markets.



Expertise in Trade Assurance, Incoterms (EXW, FOB, DDP), and factory audits.



Deep understanding of Quality Control (QC) processes.



Strong negotiation skills – you must be comfortable pushing back on suppliers to get better deals.



Highly organized with a "never trust, always verify" mindset.



Why Work With Us?



Stable, long-term full-time role.



Professional growth within a scaling e-commerce business.



Clear management structure (you will have a dedicated Operations Manager to support you).



HOW TO APPLY:



Change the subject line of your application to: "Master Sourcing Agent for Aromika".



List 3 specific "Red Flags" you look for when checking a new supplier's Alibaba profile.



Explain your process for handling a situation where a batch of 500 units has a 10?fect rate during inspection.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) explaining your biggest sourcing "win" (how you saved money or improved quality).

title: E-commerce Communication Manager (Content, Catalogs & Growth)
description:
We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Communication Manager to bridge the gap between our products and our customers. Your mission is to take the product information from our sourcing team and transform it into professional catalogs, high-converting website content, and clear brand communication.



You will report to the Operations Manager and ensure that our brand looks premium and professional across all platforms.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Content Creation: Write compelling product descriptions that sell. No generic text – we need benefits-driven copy.



Catalog Management: Design and update professional B2B/B2C catalogs (using Canva, Adobe, or similar tools).



E-commerce Development: Manage and update website content (Shopify, WooCommerce, or similar), ensuring all listings are optimized and visually appealing.



Asset Coordination: Work with the Sourcing Specialist to get high-quality product photos and videos. If the quality is low, you must provide feedback and creative direction.



Brand Voice: Ensure all communications 
s, newsletters, website) are consistent and professional.



Required Qualifications:



Excellent English: Near-native written English is a must. You should be able to write persuasively.



Design Skills: Experience with Canva is mandatory. Experience with Adobe Suite (Photoshop/InDesign) is a huge plus.



E-commerce Experience: You have previously managed product listings and website content.



Visual Eye: You can tell the difference between a "good" and a "great" product photo.



Organization: Ability to manage multiple product lines and deadlines simultaneously.



Why Work With Us?



Long-term, full-time career opportunity.



A chance to shape the visual identity of a growing brand.



Supportive management and a clear workflow.



HOW TO APPLY:



Change the subject line of your application to: "Creative Communicator for Aromika".



Include a link to your Portfolio (Catalogs you have designed or Websites you have managed). Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) explaining your process: How do you turn a raw product photo and a list of features into a professional catalog page?



Tell us which e-commerce platform (Shopify, Magento, etc.) you are most comfortable with.

speed



accuracy



consistency



clear communication

title: Business Development Manager
description:
We're looking for a highly organized and relationship-focused Business Development Manager to help manage and grow a large network of professional contacts in the entertainment industry (music, sports, film/TV, digital). This role is about meaningful outreach, follow-up, and building long-term trust across a large portfolio.



If you're detail-oriented, a strong communicator, and excited by the world of entertainment, this role could be a great fit. Must have good English writing abilities without use of AI. 



What You’ll Be Doing:



- Manage a High Volume of Contacts: Oversee a large list of professional accounts, ensuring regular communication and accurate recordkeeping.

- Outreach & Relationship Building: Proactively reach out to contacts via
 and social media to stay connected, share updates, and strengthen professional relationships.

- Craft Well-Written Messages: Write polished, thoughtful
s and messages in English—clear, natural communication is key.

- Track Progress: Use tools like HubSpot to manage follow-ups, keep conversations organized, and hit relationship-building goals.

- Work Toward Clear Targets: While there’s no selling involved, this role does have measurable outreach and engagement goals.

- Think Creatively: Develop new approaches for keeping relationships active, warm, and productive over time.



Who We’re Looking For:

- Excellent written English—you’re comfortable writing professional messages and outreach
s with clarity and polish. - - -- Must have strong English writing and speaking abilities.

- Extremely organized—you can juggle many accounts and keep your outreach and follow-ups on track.

- Self-motivated and driven—you take initiative, meet goals, and stay focused without constant supervision.

- Relationship-minded—you enjoy connecting with people and maintaining positive, long-term communication.

- Familiarity with CRM tools like HubSpot is a plus.

- Spanish fluency is a plus, but not required.

- A genuine interest in the entertainment industry—especially music, sports, film/TV, or digital media—will help you succeed in this role.

title: Job Title: Sales and Solutions Specialist – phone sales, online sales, customer service
description:
Sales and Solutions Specialists for Willis Lawn Services



About the Role

Are you a people person who loves solving puzzles? We are looking for a Sales & Solutions Specialist to join our team in 2026. This isn't just about "closing deals"—it’s about listening to our neighbors and providing real solutions that make their lives easier. You will be the first point of contact for our sales leads, ensuring they feel heard and valued from the very first hello!

Our company helps homeowners create beautiful yards by providing effective solutions for lawn and insect problems. While prior knowledge of our specific services isn't required, we are looking for candidates who are eager to learn the details of what we do!



What You’ll Do

- Engage with Leads: This role is primarily phone-based. You will spend your day talking directly to interested leads, acting as the friendly, professional voice of our company.

- Answer In-Depth Questions: Our customers are looking for experts. You will be expected to answer a high volume of questions with patience, clarity, and a "help-first" attitude.

- Precision Quoting: Use modern online mapping and measurement tools to accurately assess customer properties and generate custom quotes.

- Consultative Selling: Guide interested leads through our process and handle the signup for those ready to hire our team.

- Build Trust: Ensure every interaction reinforces our commitment to showing customers that they truly matter to us.



What We’re Looking For

 - Strong English Proficiency: Because you will be the primary point of contact for our sales leads, you must have excellent verbal and written English communication skills.

- Exceptional Communicators: You can turn a phone call into a relationship and explain services clearly.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable using CRM systems to manage your workflow, ready to learn how to measure properties online for quotes.

- Solution-Oriented: You don't just sell; you listen and recommend what is best for the customer’s specific situation.

- Detail-Oriented: Accurate measurements lead to accurate quotes—you take pride in getting the details right.



This job will be a graveyard shift position. We need someone to work 9am to 5:30pm Central Standard Time (CST) Monday through Friday, which is 11pm to 7:30am Philippine Standard Time (PST) Tuesday through Saturday  (10pm to 6:30am PST when the United States is under Daylight Savings time from Sun, Mar 8, 2026 to Sun, Nov 1, 2026). 

**This includes a 30 minute UNPAID lunch break, for a total of 40 hours worked per week. You may also take two PAID 10 minute breaks, during your shift.**



To Apply:

To be considered, please submit your resume with a link to a Loom video at the very top of your message.  In the video, please introduce yourself and explain why you’re a great fit for our team, our mission to provide real solutions for our neighbors, and our commitment to making every customer feel valued!

title: Payment Processing / Support Assistant (Night Shift)
description:
At Higher Support Agency, we help online businesses run smoothly by providing reliable customer support, payment processing, and operational assistance. We work closely with ecommerce brands to support their day-to-day operations behind the scenes.



We’re currently looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Customer Support Assistant to join our team. This role is primarily focused on payment processing, with some light operational and customer support tasks as needed. Compared to a standard Customer Support Representative role, this position is less demanding and more task-focused, making it ideal for someone who is organized, dependable, and comfortable working independently.



Role Overview:

We’re looking for a reliable and detail-oriented assistant to support our ecommerce operations.



This role is mainly focused on payment processing and internal tasks, with some light customer support when needed. Compared to a typical customer service role, this position is more structured, task-based, and lower volume.



Most of your work will involve following clear processes and ensuring everything is accurate and organized.



Key Responsibilities:

- Verify, log, and process customer payments accurately

- Ensure associated orders are correctly recorded and moved forward for fulfillment

- Maintain organized and accurate records of payments and transactions

- Occasionally assist with inventory updates or product listings

- Provide light chat and email support when required

- Coordinate with internal teams to ensure smooth order handling

- Flag and escalate any payment or order issues when needed

- Follow established processes and communicate clearly if issues or improvements are identified



Qualifications:

- At least 2 years of experience in an ecommerce or customer support–related role

- Strong written communication skills for basic chat and email responses

- Experience using CRM or ticketing systems (Zendesk, Gorgias, or similar)

- Familiarity with ecommerce platforms such as WooCommerce or Shopify

- Comfortable using Google Sheets for tracking, logging, and basic formulas

- Highly detail-oriented with strong organizational skills

- Able to work independently with minimal supervision

- Reliable, consistent, and comfortable handling routine processing tasks

- Must have a stable internet connection, computer/laptop, and an additional monitor



Schedule & Work Setup:

This is a fully remote, full-time position. Schedule may vary slightly based on business needs, but the current schedule is:

Week 1 – Training:

 Monday to Friday, 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM PST

 (9:00 PM – 5:00 AM Philippine Time)



Week 2 onward:

 Same schedule as training

 Monday to Friday, 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM PST

 (9:00 PM – 5:00 AM Philippine Time)



*This role follows Pacific Time (Canada).*



To apply for this job, please fill out this form: https://forms.gle/y6dNaVXWJFeYtLyN8 so we have a better idea of you as an applicant. Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Marketing Assistant (Full-Time)
description:
Company: Truit

Position: Marketing Assistant (Full-Time)

Location: Remote (Philippines only)

Work Hours: Monday–Friday | 8:00 AM–5:00 PM (U.S. Pacific Time)

Salary: USD $800–$1,000/month (based on experience and performance)



Why Join Truit?



Truit is a U.S.-based Managed IT and Cybersecurity company helping small and mid-sized businesses improve how they operate through better IT, cybersecurity, and systems.



We’re growing our marketing efforts and are looking for a Marketing Assistant to help with consistent execution across social media,
, and LinkedIn. This role supports ongoing campaigns and works closely with the team to keep marketing moving forward.



This is a hands-on, collaborative role for someone who enjoys execution, organization, and contributing ideas while working within an established brand.





The Purpose of This Role



Your role is to support and contribute to marketing execution.



You will work closely with:

- The Marketing Manager (primary coordination)

- John (CEO) for marketing-related tasks and follow-ups



Campaigns, content direction, and priorities are planned together. You will help execute marketing activities, keep tasks organized, and follow through on assigned work.



Part of this role includes creating content for posts and campaigns, making sure it aligns with Truit’s brand, tone, and voice. You won’t be guessing or operating in isolation. You’ll have direction, examples, and feedback to help you stay aligned.





What Success Looks Like (First 90 Days)

- Marketing tasks are completed on time with clear communication

- Social media,
, and LinkedIn activities run consistently based on the agreed plan

- Content created for posts and campaigns aligns with Truit’s brand and messaging

- Marketing-related tasks for John are tracked and followed up, coordinated with the Marketing Manager

- You actively participate in team discussions and brainstorming

- You show reliability, consistency, and improvement over time





What You’ll Be Doing

- Create and schedule social media posts that match Truit’s brand and tone

- Assist with
 campaigns, including basic content creation and setup

- Support LinkedIn posting, engagement, and campaign activities

- Help organize marketing calendars, tasks, and deadlines

- Track assigned marketing to-dos and provide regular updates

- Assist with campaign setup and workflows in Go High Level (GHL)

- Participate in team brainstorming and review sessions

- Share simple weekly updates on completed tasks and activity





Required Skills & Experience

- Experience supporting B2B marketing (assistant or coordinator level)

- Ability to create marketing content for posts and campaigns using existing brand direction

- Comfortable with social media posting and
 marketing

- Familiarity with Go High Level (GHL) or similar marketing tools

- Good written and spoken English

- Organized, dependable, and comfortable working as part of a team



Nice to Have (Not Required)

- Experience with IT, MSP, or cybersecurity companies

- Experience supporting a marketing manager or business owner

- A portfolio of social posts,
 campaigns, or marketing work





What You’ll Get

- Full-time, long-term remote role

- Clear collaboration and guidance

- Opportunity to improve marketing and content skills

- Supportive, team-focused work environment

- Consistent schedule and expectations





How to Apply

Please submit:

Your updated CV

Your portfolio (if available)



NOTE: Apply using 8 points or more.

title: Marketing Systems & Growth Architect
description:
The Marketing Systems & Growth Architect will own, rebuild, and scale My Amazon Guy’s marketing infrastructure, with a primary focus on HubSpot architecture, lifecycle automation, attribution clarity, and governance standards. This is a systems-first, hands-on role responsible for transforming our CRM and marketing automation ecosystem into a clean, scalable, revenue-driving engine. This is not a brand marketing or campaign execution role. This is a technical marketing systems leadership position focused on structure, integrity, and long-term scalability.



Key Responsibilities:

- Audit, clean, and restructure CRM data, workflows, lifecycle stages, and automation

- Remove deprecated assets, deduplicate records, and eliminate redundant processes

- Establish clear lifecycle definitions, segmentation logic, and governance standards

- Build intent-based segmentation and automated journeys tied to revenue movement

- Align marketing automation with sales handoffs and outbound outreach

- Prevent overlapping messaging and ensure accurate intent-driven actions

- Standardize tracking, UTMs, and attribution across marketing and sales platforms

- Improve visibility into MQL ? SQL ? Opportunity progression and reporting accuracy

- Reduce unnecessary broadcast activity and reporting ambiguity

- Implement request protocols, documentation, and long-term system governance



Qualifications:

- 5+ years in Marketing Operations, RevOps, or Marketing Technology

- Deep, hands-on HubSpot experience (required)

- Proven experience cleaning and restructuring complex CRM environments

- Strong understanding of paid media funnels and conversion tracking

- Experience with lifecycle marketing, lead scoring, and segmentation frameworks

- Experience building or restructuring automation systems

- Comfortable enforcing governance and setting system standards

- Experience working with distributed teams (Filipino team experience preferred)



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement



You’re exactly who we’re looking for—so what’s stopping you? Apply now and let’s make it official.



Follow-up
s are welcome at

title: Amazon Brand Manager & Brand Manager Intern
description:
AMAZON BRAND MANAGER



We are looking for a talented and versatile Amazon Brand Manager! If you think that you have what it takes to be successful in this role, we welcome you to apply!



Do you like going from one meeting to another with non-stop action and solving problems every day while managing 8 people? Where you are trying to please clients and juggling tons of competing priorities? If so, this is the job for you.



Brand Managers own the relationships at our agency. It’s your job to make customers like us while delivering our team’s accurate non-stop activities.



Responsibilities:

- Manage clients' accounts assigned. The Brand Manager will act as the direct point of contact for the client, responsible for coordinating MAGs services, implementing strategy, communicating with clients, direct reports, and leadership.

- 2+ Direct Reports. In addition to client services, this position is also a managerial position, and following the completion of training, brand managers will be expected to lead a small team of Amazon specialists, who will assist the manager with delivering MAG services to the client.

- Brand managers are the company's backbone, directly responsible for our client accounts.

- Proactively provide a strategy for the account, communicate with the client, and ensure MAG process and deliverables are met.

- Delegate tasks properly to your direct reports and the MAG teams, follow up on delegations, hold staff accountable, and report back to the client.



Qualifications:

- Amazon Expertise: 1+ year with Seller Central (flat files, FBA, PPC, SEO, reinstatements, brand registry, Helium10, keyword research).

- Agency & Management: Experience handling multiple demands, leading teams, hiring, and performance management.

- Project & Client Management: Skilled in multitasking, project management, client communication, and account ownership.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable with tools like Zoom, Slack, Asana, and adapting in fast-changing environments.

- Passion for eCommerce: Independent, people-focused, and driven to grow client sales on Amazon.



Expectations:

- Competitive salary!

- Fun Fully Remote Culture – Community Culture, Team Oriented Environment

- You can have your OWN Amazon selling business and utilize company resources to build your own account! We love and ? encourage entrepreneurs, in fact, the majority of employees have their own selling accounts!

- Unlimited Learning and Growth – If you meet and exceed our core values and grow sales, you will have unlimited opportunities to grow, advance, promote, and earn more.

- 40 hours a week, 8 hours a day

- Permanent WFH setup

- The work schedule is in Eastern Standard Time (Monday to Friday only)

- A dual-monitor setup is required (at least 8GB of RAM)

- Good quality camera and microphone

- Must have at least 25 MBPS internet speed

- Must consistently maintain good performance and seek skills development for professional growth.





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





AMAZON BRAND MANAGER INTERN



Want to catapult out of that “Walmart uniform” and into a world of digital marketing?



We're hiring a Brand Manager Intern at our agency. If you're a tech-savvy gamer who thrives amidst organized chaos, then you are the one that we are looking for!



We will train you how to manage people effectively, communicate better with clients, and navigate tools such as Slack smoothly, while you work at home on your computer. You also get to learn how to sell on Amazon which is the number 1 wealth generation platform in the USA for beginners.



Here's what you'd be doing with us:

- Mastermind core services like PPC, SEO, Design, Catalog merchandising, and troubleshoot like a pro.

- Take charge of at least 8-10 accounts in Seller Central Accounts under a Brand Manager.

- Be the communication bridge between clients and our agency.

- Train and mentor at least 2 AS Intern/BM Intern.



Yes, it's challenging. Yes, it's exciting. Yes, it could be the start of your new career!



We will train you on everything. MAG is an education company and we find it’s easier to find the right culture fit and then train the skills than the other way around.



We're looking for:

- High Drive

- Friendly Introverts

- Strategic Communication Skills

- Ability to take charge, and follow through on a plan



So what are you waiting for? Toss away that nametag and make the switch today.



Expectations:

- 40 hours a week, 8 hours a day

- You work on your own computer and dual monitors

- Must have at least 25 MBPS internet speed

- Know how to use basic Google Sheets and Excel functions



You’ve got the talent—we’ve got the opportunity. Take control of your career and apply now!



For any questions or follow-ups,
 us at

title: Operations Manager & HR Partner (The "Right Hand" to CEO)
description:
I am looking for a high-level Operations Manager / HR Partner in the Philippines to take full ownership of my business results. I am not looking for a Virtual Assistant who waits for instructions. I need a leader who brings solutions, manages the team, and ensures that every hire adds value to the company.



You will be the bridge between my vision and the team's execution. Your goal is to free up my time so I can focus on big-picture growth while you handle the day-to-day operations and team performance.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Team Leadership & HR: Recruit, onboard, and manage a team (including Sourcing and Communications managers). You will track their KPIs and ensure they are productive.



Operations & Supply Chain: Oversee the Alibaba sourcing process. Ensure quality control, negotiate better terms with suppliers, and manage procurement timelines.



Project Management: Drive the development of e-commerce projects, website content updates, and the creation of professional product catalogs.



Strategic Reporting: Provide weekly reports on business performance, team efficiency, and project status.



Required Qualifications:



Proven experience as an Operations Manager, Project Manager, or Team Lead.



Deep understanding of Alibaba sourcing and supply chain management.



Experience in E-commerce (website content management, catalog creation, digital sales flow).



Expert level in project management tools (Asana, ClickUp, or Trello).



Ability to make decisions independently and "manage up" (tell me what needs to be done, don't just ask).



Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal).



Why Work With Us?



Long-term, stable full-time position.



Performance-based bonuses (We reward results, not just hours).



Direct communication with the CEO.



Opportunity to help build and scale a business from the ground up.





HOW TO APPLY (Follow these instructions strictly):



Change the subject line of your application to: "I am the Leader you need for Aromika.



Briefly describe a situation where you managed a team and solved a major problem without the owner’s help.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you are an "A-Player" Manager, not just a VA.

title: Strategic Alibaba Sourcing & Procurement Specialist
description:
We are looking for an experienced Sourcing & Procurement Specialist to handle our supply chain operations on Alibaba. Your main goal is to find the best manufacturers, negotiate the best possible terms, and ensure that every product that leaves China meets our high-quality standards.



You will report directly to our Operations Manager and work closely with the CEO.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Supplier Vetting: Identify and verify manufacturers on Alibaba (avoiding trading companies/middlemen).



Negotiation: Negotiate pricing, MOQs (Minimum Order Quantities), and payment terms (aiming for 30/70 splits via Trade Assurance).



Sample Management: Coordinate sample production and shipping to ensure they meet specifications.



Quality Control: Arrange third-party inspections and ensure all production issues are fixed before final payment.



Logistics Coordination: Work with freight forwarders to ensure timely delivery and correct documentation.



Required Qualifications:



Min 2-3 years of experience specifically in Alibaba sourcing for international markets.



Expertise in Trade Assurance, Incoterms (EXW, FOB, DDP), and factory audits.



Deep understanding of Quality Control (QC) processes.



Strong negotiation skills – you must be comfortable pushing back on suppliers to get better deals.



Highly organized with a "never trust, always verify" mindset.



Why Work With Us?



Stable, long-term full-time role.



Professional growth within a scaling e-commerce business.



Clear management structure (you will have a dedicated Operations Manager to support you).



HOW TO APPLY:



Change the subject line of your application to: "Master Sourcing Agent for Aromika".



List 3 specific "Red Flags" you look for when checking a new supplier's Alibaba profile.



Explain your process for handling a situation where a batch of 500 units has a 10?fect rate during inspection.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) explaining your biggest sourcing "win" (how you saved money or improved quality).

title: Business Development Manager / Operations Architect (KPI & Team Building)
description:
Job Title: Business Development & Operations Architect (KPIs + Hiring + Systems)

The Mission:

We are a growing company with a clear vision, but we need a System Builder to create the internal engine. I am looking for a right-hand person who doesn’t just "manage" tasks but designs the organizational structure, sets the metrics for success, and hires the talent to execute it.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Organizational Design: Audit our current workflow and build a scalable team hierarchy.



KPI Management: Define, implement, and track Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for every department to ensure accountability.



Talent Acquisition: Identify gaps in our team, write job descriptions, and lead the recruitment process to hire A-players.



SOP Creation: Build a library of Standard Operating Procedures so the business can run without constant supervision.



Who You Are:



You have a proven track record of building company structures or scaling departments.



You are data-driven—you believe that if it’s not measured, it’s not managed.



You are an expert recruiter who can spot talent and culture-fit from a mile away.



You have high-level English skills and a "builder" mentality (you find solutions, not excuses).



?? PRE-INTERVIEW TEST (Follow these steps or your application will be ignored):

To ensure you have the attention to detail required for this role, please follow these instructions exactly:



Subject Line: Change your application subject to: "SYSTEM ARCHITECT - [Your Years of Management Experience]" (e.g., SYSTEM ARCHITECT - 5 Years).



The Question: In your cover letter, answer this: "If a department is underperforming, what are the first 3 metrics (KPIs) you would check to find the root cause?"



The Video: Record a 60-90 second Loom video introducing yourself and describing one specific team or system you built from scratch. (Paste the link in your application).



Tools: List the top 3 software tools you use to manage team performance and tasks.



Why Join Us?



Full-time, long-term remote position.



High level of autonomy—you design the systems.



Competitive salary based on experience and results.

title: Mozaik CNC Specialist – GC Code Optimization (Cabinet Manufacturing)

Detect and fix errors before CNC production

Experience with CNC production workflows



Attention to detail (VERY important)



Ability to work independently and communicate clearly
