title: Outbound Appointment Setter / Sales Development Representative (Part-Time to Full Time)
description:
Location: Remote

Schedule: Part-time, but will transition into full-time after 2 weeks or 1 month



Compensation:

$5/hour base pay

$5 bonus per attended appointment

$15 bonus per closed deal



About the Role



We are looking for a high-energy, results-driven Outbound Appointment Setter / SDR to help us connect with qualified leads, book calls, and support business growth through proactive outbound efforts.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys being on the phone, knows how to build trust quickly, and thrives in a performance-based environment. You should be comfortable making a high volume of outbound calls, handling objections, and converting conversations into booked appointments.



We are not just looking for someone who can “dial.” We want someone with a hunter mentality someone who enjoys the challenge of outbound sales and knows how to turn conversations into opportunities.



What You’ll Do



Make high-volume outbound calls to warm and cold leads



Book qualified appointments for the sales team



Follow scripts, frameworks, and training provided during onboarding



Handle objections confidently and keep conversations moving toward a booked call



Update lead statuses and manage pipelines inside our CRM



Participate in role-play sessions, coaching, and sales training



Learn and adapt quickly to our offer, ideal client, and messaging



Potentially assist with inbox management and light outreach tasks as training progresses



What We’re Looking For



Must-have qualities:



Strong outbound calling or appointment setting experience



Excellent English communication skills



Confident, persuasive, and emotionally intelligent on the phone



Able to build rapport quickly and lower resistance in conversations



Comfortable with performance-based compensation



Coachable and open to feedback, role plays, and ongoing training



Self-motivated and consistent with daily activity targets



Ideal background:



Experience making 150–200 calls per day



Experience in cold calling, appointment setting, telesales, or SDR roles



Familiarity with CRM tools and pipeline management



Experience in service-based businesses, B2B, coaching, healthcare, or similar industries is a plus



Willingness to learn social media outreach and inbox engagement over time



What Success Looks Like



In this role, success is measured by outcomes, not just activity. You will be expected to:



Maintain strong daily call volume



Consistently book appointments



Help improve show-up rates



Contribute to closed deals through quality conversations and follow-up



We are looking for someone who can quickly become productive and help us increase qualified conversations each week.



To apply, please submit your resume to 

with the subject line: “Hire Me Now– [Your Name]”



Submit a 2–3 minute Loom video explaining:

Your outbound experience

Your best KPI results

Experience working with U.S.-based clients

Include screenshots proving performance (booked calls, outreach volume, KPIs).

title: Social Media Video Content Specialist (Video and Reels) – SEO-Focused
description:
???? About the Role



We’re looking for a Video Content Specialist who understands more than just editing—someone who knows how short-form video content impacts SEO, discoverability, and lead generation.

Search rankings (Google + social platforms)



Local SEO visibility



Click-through rates and conversions

Keywords in captions



Hashtags and metadata



On-screen text for search relevance



Repurpose content to support website SEO and Google indexing



Align video content with search intent and customer behavior



Track performance and adjust content for better reach and conversions



? Requirements (Must Have)

Understanding of true SEO (not just hashtags)



Knowledge of:



Keyword intent



Content indexing



How social signals support visibility



Ability to create content that drives traffic—not just views



Strong editing skills (CapCut, Canva, or similar)



? Bonus Skills



Experience with Google Business Profile optimization



Basic understanding of YouTube SEO / video indexing



Experience working with U.S. local service businesses



? Position Details



Part-time: ~15 hours per week



Flexible schedule



Long-term opportunity



???? How to Apply (IMPORTANT)



To be considered, include:



Links to your best video content



A short explanation of how video content helps SEO



Your answer to this:

“How would you use video to help a local business rank higher on Google?”



Include the word “SEO VIDEO” in your subject line



???? What We’re Really Looking For



Someone who understands:

???? Views are vanity

???? Traffic, rankings, and conversions are the goal



???? Test Task (Required for Consideration)



We want to see how you think—not just how you edit.



???? Scenario:



You are creating a short-form video for a self-storage facility targeting people searching for storage in a local area.



???? Your Task:



Create a 30–45 second video concept (you can submit as a draft video OR written plan) that is designed to:



Rank and/or be discoverable on Google and social platforms



Attract local customers actively searching for storage



Convert viewers into leads or rentals



???? Include the Following:



Video Concept



What is the idea? (example: “5 signs you need a storage unit in [City]”)



Hook (First 3 seconds)



What stops the scroll?



Target Keywords



Example: “storage units in [city]”, “cheap storage near me”



Caption + Hashtags



Show how you would optimize for discovery



On-Screen Text Plan



What text appears in the video to support SEO?



Call to Action



What gets the viewer to take action?



Bonus (Optional but Powerful)



How would you repurpose this video to support:



Google Business Profile



Website SEO



YouTube Shorts



?? Important



We are NOT looking for:



Generic content ideas



Trend-only videos with no strategy



We ARE looking for:



Clear understanding of search intent



How content drives traffic + conversions



Ability to connect video ? SEO ? leads



???? How We Evaluate



We will prioritize candidates who:



Show real SEO thinking (not just hashtags)



Understand local search behavior



Create content with a purpose (not just views)

title: Figma Website Designer Wanted - Immediate Start
description:
We are currently looking for a creative and reliable Figma Designer to join our team and assist with the design of websites and landing pages for ongoing projects.



In this role, you will be responsible for creating clean, modern Figma designs that will later be developed into fully functioning websites. Our team will provide guidelines, examples, and clear instructions, but we are looking for someone who can also bring their own creativity and design sense to each project.



Most of the websites we design are within the trades and construction industry, including businesses such as electricians, plumbers, builders, landscapers, and other similar services. Because of this, experience designing service-based business websites would be very beneficial.



We are looking for someone who can work efficiently and meet relatively quick timelines, as many of our projects move at a fast pace. There will be ongoing work available for the right person who can consistently deliver high-quality designs.



Responsibilities:



• Design website and landing page layouts in Figma

• Follow guidelines and instructions provided by our team

• Create clean, professional layouts that are conversion-focused and user-friendly

• Structure designs so they can be easily developed by our development team

• Ensure designs are organized, consistent, and visually appealing

• Deliver designs within the required project timelines



Requirements:



• Strong experience using Figma for website design

• Good understanding of modern website layout and user experience

• Ability to follow instructions while still contributing creative design ideas

• Strong attention to detail and clean design structure

• Ability to work efficiently under tight timelines

• Reliable communication and availability for ongoing work



To confirm that you have read the full job listing, please include the phrase “I listen to Dylan” somewhere in your application.



When applying, please include examples of Figma website designs you have created. If you have examples of trades or construction-related websites (electricians, plumbers, builders, etc.), that would be especially helpful.



We are looking for someone who can become a reliable part of our team and assist with ongoing Figma design work for websites and landing pages.

, SMS, and promotional visuals aligned with brand identity

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





CREATIVE STRATEGIST



The Creative Strategist will own the research, ideation, and optimization of creative assets across paid ads,
/SMS, landing pages, and UGC. They'll translate brand goals, market data, and consumer psychology into briefs, scripts, and testing roadmaps, partnering with designers, editors, media buyers, and UGC creators to execute.



This role focuses on conversion optimization and creative direction — guiding creative generalists, reviewing and approving output, and ensuring all creatives are aligned with CRO goals. The strategist does not handle direct web design, but must have strong CRO experience to boost campaign effectiveness.



Key Responsibilities:

- Develop creative roadmaps for DTC brands, concept new hooks and angles, and build testing frameworks across multiple ad formats.

- Guide creative generalists and support
/SMS and CRO-focused landing page strategy without executing web design.

- Track and interpret performance data, document insights, and iterate continuously to optimize campaigns.

- Present strategies, testing plans, and performance recaps to clients and internal leadership to support retention and revenue goals.



Qualifications:

- Ability to analyze creative performance metrics and translate data insights into actionable design or messaging improvements.

- Strong leadership and feedback skills to guide generalists and align creative output with performance goals.

- Ability to drive creative decisions that enhance campaign effectiveness and conversion rates.

title: Senior Developer & IT Documentation Specialist
description:
SENIOR DEVELOPER



We are looking for a Senior Developer who is a versatile, all-around technical expert capable of managing end-to-end development of systems, applications, and web platforms. The ideal candidate thrives in a remote, collaborative environment and is comfortable supporting cross-functional teams with both front-end and back-end solutions, system integrations, automation, and technical troubleshooting.



This role requires a highly organized, detail-oriented, and technology-focused professional who can communicate effectively across teams, manage complex workflows, and adapt quickly to new tools and processes.



Key Responsibilities:

- Full-Stack Development & Systems Management: Design, develop, and maintain web applications, internal tools, and CMS platforms (especially WordPress); build front-end and back-end functionality, troubleshoot issues, and document systems for team accessibility.

- Integrations & Automation: Implement API integrations, database connections, and workflow automation using tools like Zapier; maintain and support company software and applications across multiple platforms.

- Data Analysis & Reporting: Analyze data, create dashboards and visualizations, and use reporting tools to support decision-making while ensuring system security and compliance.

- Collaboration & Team Support: Work closely with marketing, operations, and leadership teams; communicate technical solutions clearly; provide guidance, mentorship, and contribute to process improvements.

- Onboarding & Knowledge Sharing: Train tea
mbers, document workflows and technical tools, and support ad-hoc tasks to improve team efficiency and continuity.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in full-stack development or systems development, including front-end and back-end technologies.

- Proficiency in WordPress and other CMS platforms.

- Strong understanding of IT procedures, system architecture, and security practices.

- Proficiency with Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, Excel, and data visualization tools.

- Experience with APIs, database integration, and automation tools (Zapier, HubSpot, Airtable).

- Excellent analytical, logical thinking, and problem-solving skills.

- Strong attention to detail, organization, and ability to prioritize tasks.

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills.

- Ability to work independently and effectively in a remote work environment.

- Strong interpersonal skills and cross-team collaboration abilities.



Nice to have:

- Experience with Amazon Seller Central, Helium 10, or other e-commerce platforms.

- Familiarity with project management tools like 
, Asana, Slack, and Time Doctor.

- Knowledge of security protocols and IT compliance standards.

- Experience in digital marketing technology applications and online marketing workflows.

- Understanding of cloud-based systems and SaaS platforms.





-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





IT DOCUMENTATION SPECIALIST



The IT Documentation Specialist will create, update, and maintain documentation related to IT systems and processes. This will include writing Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), creating flow charts, and troubleshooting IT documents to ensure accuracy and compliance. This role will serve as a primary technical resource for updates to the relevant documentation.



Responsibilities:

- Identify the need for, and create documents related to, IT systems and processes.

- Document IT processes such as business requirements, design reviews, system setup, configuration, user access, and security.

- Write SOPs to ensure processes are well documented.

- Create flow charts and other visuals to improve readability.

- Review and monitor documentation for accuracy and changes as needed.

- Respond promptly to requests for updates or new documents.

- Stay up to date on IT system processes and trends.

- QA Tasks to ensure that tasks are error-free

- Proactively contribute to providing strategies for training and upskill advancements

- Always come prepared

- Assignments are properly actioned and handled per mag standards

- Act as a direct liaison between end users and IT, and help share knowledge in the org through documentation



Qualifications:

- 1+ years of experience in a similar role

- Bachelor’s degree in IT, computer science, or other relevant fields

- Exceptional communication capabilities, both written and verbal

- Ability to multitask and prioritize

- Proven ability to understand and write technical documents

- In-depth knowledge of IT systems and processes

- Proficient with Microsoft Office, G Suite applications, and computer security systems

- Proficient with, or able to quickly become proficient with, a range of general and specialized applications, software, and hardware used in the organization and the industry.

- Expert in problem-solving, critical thinking, and an understanding of complex system dependencies



What We Offer:

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement

title: Outbound Sales Development Representative & Business Development Representative
description:
OUTBOUND SALES DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE



This role is strategically focused on generating new business opportunities through targeted outbound outreach. The Outbound SDR serves as the first point of contact for potential clients, identifying prospects, initiating conversations, and driving them into the sales pipeline. You will manage outbound campaigns, conduct personalized outreach, and build strong engagement with high-value leads. This position requires strong persistence, excellent communication skills, and the ability to build effective processes for high-touch outbound engagement.



Goal:

To create a steady flow of qualified outbound opportunities by identifying, engaging, and advancing potential clients into meaningful sales conversations.



Key Responsibilities:

- Outbound Prospecting: Identify and target potential clients through
, calls, and social outreach to generate qualified leads for the sales team.

- Personalized Outreach: Create tailored messaging for specific industries, decision-makers, or company profiles to increase engagement and response rates.

- Pipeline Generation: Build and maintain a strong pipeline of outbound leads, ensuring consistent activity and follow-ups.

- Lead Qualification: Evaluate outbound prospects to ensure alignment with service offerings and pass qualified opportunities to the sales team.

- Collaboration With Sales & Marketing: Work closely with sales to refine ideal client profiles and with marketing to improve outbound messaging and campaign performance.

- CRM Management: Keep detailed, accurate records of outreach activity, follow-ups, and prospect interactions within the CRM.

- Process Building & Optimization: Develop, refine, and scale processes for efficient and high-touch outbound engagement.



Qualifications:

- Experience in outbound sales, lead generation, or a similar role is preferred.

- Strong organizational skills with excellent attention to detail.

- Proven track record of consistently meeting or exceeding outreach and pipeline targets.

- Advanced knowledge of HubSpot preferred; experience with other CRM tools is a plus.

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

- Motivated self-starter with the ability to work independently and drive tasks forward.

- Comfortable with leadership, taking initiative, and improving workflows.

- Strong interpersonal skills: able to communicate value clearly, handle objections, and build rapport during outbound conversations.

- Has a history of building processes around high-touch outbound client engagement.





--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE



Do you enjoy doing sales while collaborating with people? How about doing content on TikTok, Instagram, or on Loom? Can you express yourself fluently in English? If you said yes to all three, My Amazon Guy has the perfect job offer for you!



In summary, you will record tutorials or audits using Loom to get sales leads for our Agency. You will be setting up appointments, and doing
 management to schedule prospective clients w/ our Sales Managers.



If you are direct and to the point, you will fit in at MAG!



Key Responsibilities:

- Send a minimum of 17 videos daily or 85 videos weekly

- 2 Booked Calls Per Week

- Call 14-18 prospects to follow up daily.

- Send daily reports to your assigned direct manager/supervisor

- Keep an eye on Slack, especially Sales channels

- Attend weekly sync with the Business Development Representatives (BDR) Team

- Attend a one-on-one meeting with the BDR Team Lead

- Watch 5 different people's videos every week.

- Complete at least 4 MAG courses



Qualifications:

- Excellent communication and engagement skills.

- Ability to multi-task and produce high-quality content online.

- Knows how to be professional yet must be fun and creative in making content ideas.

- Motivated, Driven, Tech Savvy, Sociable Go Getters (No experience required, we will train the right candidate)

- Should have a professional work area to do content (clear camera and audio)

- Ability to build relationships and collaborate effectively through videos.

- Must be tech-savvy and familiar with current trends.

- Be organized and input potential leads into our CRM (Customer Relationship) software and follow up according to our agency standards

- Driven to make 20 loom videos (sales outreach)



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent WFH setup

- Unlimited FREE access to MAG School courses and SOP Library!

- Work schedule is in EST (Monday-Friday only)

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement



Why wait for permission to level up? Apply now and step into a role where your skills are truly valued.

description:
We are looking for a highly detail-oriented KPI Manager to track, analyze, and enforce performance across multiple business units (real estate, cleaning services, and property management).

mbers

mbers are accountable to targets

Requirements:

$4–7/hour (depending on experience)



Success Looks Like:

- All KPIs are updated weekly without fail

- Tea
mbers are consistently held accountable

- Business performance improves week over week

title: Lead Designer
description:
About Us

We are an international award winning design firm that specializes in transforming short term rental properties into beautiful, functional spaces that stand out in the vacation rental market. Our goal is to create memorable guest experiences while helping property owners maximize the potential of their homes through thoughtful design.

Our team works remotely and collaborates on projects across a variety of markets including mountain homes, beach houses, cabins, and city apartments.



Instagram





Job Overview

We are looking for a Lead Interior Designer to take ownership of design projects from concept through completion.

This role requires someone who is both creative and organized. You will lead design projects, guide junior designers, and work closely with project managers and clients to bring each property to life.

Most of our projects are short term rentals, so designs must be visually appealing, durable, and guest friendly.

This is a remote role. We prefer someone who can overlap with US working hours. Preferred hours are 8 AM to 5 PM EST.



Key Responsibilities

Lead the design process from concept to final installation across multiple projects.

Develop design concepts, mood boards, and presentations.

Create layouts, floor plans, and 3D models.

Source furniture, decor, lighting, and materials suitable for high use rental properties.

Review and guide the work of junior designers.

Ensure designs align with the project vision, timeline, and budget.

Prepare design packages and product selections for procurement.

Collaborate with project managers and procurement teams.

Provide direction for staging and final setup before property photoshoots.

Stay updated on design trends relevant to vacation rentals and hospitality.

Design Tools and Software

Candidates should have experience with or willingness to learn the following tools

SketchUp, AutoCAD, Canva, Adobe Photoshop, Google Drive, Google Slides, Notion, Pinterest, Loom



Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Interior Design, Architecture, or a related field.

5 or more years of interior design experience.

Strong portfolio demonstrating completed projects.

Experience leading design projects and working directly with clients.

Proficiency in SketchUp, AutoCAD, Canva, and presentation tools.

Strong organization and project management skills.

Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines.

Comfort working remotely with a distributed team.



Preferred Experience

Experience designing short term rentals or hospitality spaces.

Experience mentoring or managing junior designers.

Experience sourcing furniture and materials for high traffic properties.

Experience staging properties for real estate or vacation rental photography.



Why Join Us

Work remotely from anywhere.

Lead projects across unique properties and markets.

Collaborate with a passionate team of designers and project managers.

Opportunity to grow into a senior leadership role within the design team.



Application Process

To help us better understand your design thinking and workflow, candidates will be asked to complete a short design task assessment. This exercise allows us to evaluate creativity, problem solving, and attention to detail in a real design scenario.

title: FT - Airbnb Guest Experience Specialist
description:
Job Title: Airbnb Guest Experience Specialist

Schedule: 8am - 5pm Monday - Friday (EST)

Hours: Full-time 45 Hours

Pay: $720 - $1,080 a month ($4/hr - $6/hr) USD



About Us:

Coastal Breeze Getaways is a premier short-term rental management company on Florida’s Gulf Coast, founded by a former electrical engineer who brings high-level precision and data-driven systems to the hospitality space. 



Because we are active investors ourselves, we operate with a unique edge: we treat every single property we manage with the exact same care and strategic oversight as our own assets. 



We pride ourselves on a transparent, family-oriented culture where hard work is deeply rewarded, making this the perfect home for a high-performer who wants to grow alongside a scalable, tech-forward business.





Preferred Languages:

* Spanish (Highly Preferred) – Many of our guests speak Spanish, so the ability to communicate comfortably in Spanish by message or phone is a major advantage.



Responsibilities:

* Respond to all guest messages, booking inquiries, and issues via Guesty, OpenPhone,
, and social channels

* Maintain fast response times and professional communication with guests before, during, and after their stay

* Call guests directly when necessary to resolve urgent issues, clarify questions, or de-escalate concerns quickly

* Update house manuals, digital guides, and listing descriptions when property updates occur

* Support guests pre-stay, during their stay, and post-stay to ensure a seamless experience

* Document systems and processes and help improve and automate workflows where possible



Accountability & Performance Metrics: Guest Experience

* Maintain 4.95+ average guest review rating across all listings

* Resolve urgent guest issues (lockouts, tech issues, access questions) within 5–10 minutes of report

Skills & Qualifications:

* Strong problem-solving and conflict resolution skills

* Confident speaking with guests on the phone and comfortable making calls when issues arise

* Ability to remain calm and solution-focused when handling guest concerns

* Excellent written English and guest communication skills

* Ability to make independent decisions while following established processes

* Strong attention to detail and organizational skills: Secret Code CBGAGES310

* Self-starter who takes ownership of tasks and identifies ways to improve operations

* Spanish speaking ability is a strong plus and helpful when assisting Spanish-speaking guests

* Scheduled Hours Minimum: 45 hours (Must Track Hours)

title: Customer Service Advisor
description:
Customer Service Advisor – Omrax Limited



We are a thriving online furniture retailer with a strong presence across multiple online marketplaces, including Amazon, Wayfair, The Range, and B&Q. We pride ourselves on offering a wide range of high-quality furniture and delivering exceptional service to our customers. Our team is friendly, close-knit, and dedicated, and we are now looking for a Customer Service Advisor to join us and help maintain our excellent reputation.



As a Customer Service Advisor at Omrax, you will be a key part of ensuring our customers enjoy a smooth and positive shopping experience. You will handle customer inquiries, resolve issues, and provide outstanding service across multiple online platforms, including eDesk, Zendesk, Mirakl, and Virtual Stock.



Key Responsibilities:



Customer Support: Respond promptly and professionally to customer inquiries about products, orders, returns, and warranties.



Issue Resolution: Resolve customer issues efficiently, including delivery delays, damaged items, or returns, while maintaining a high level of customer satisfaction.



Platform Management: Use eDesk, Zendesk, Mirakl, and Virtual Stock to track, manage, and resolve customer service requests.



Order Management: Assist with order placement, shipment tracking, and ensure a smooth purchasing experience. Experience with Linnworks is ideal.



Product Knowledge: Develop a thorough understanding of our product catalog to provide accurate and helpful information.



Feedback Collection: Gather and document customer feedback to identify areas for improvement and highlight positive experiences.



Team Collaboration: Work closely with colleagues to ensure a seamless customer experience.



Workload Prioritization: Manage multiple inquiries efficiently, know how to prioritize tasks, and work well under pressure.



Personal Touch: Communicate with customers in a friendly and professional manner, ensuring messages feel personal and engaging.



Qualifications & Skills:



Previous experience in customer service, ideally in e-commerce or online retail.



Experience working with major clients such as Wayfair, The Range, and B&Q is highly desirable.



Proficiency in eDesk, Zendesk, Mirakl, and Virtual Stock.



Experience with Linnworks is ideal.



Strong written and verbal communication skills with a friendly, professional approach.



Excellent problem-solving abilities and attention to detail.



Self-motivated, positive, and able to work efficiently under pressure.



Strong organizational skills and ability to prioritize workload.



Experience typing clear, accurate, and personable messages to customers.



A passion for delivering exceptional customer service and ensuring customer satisfaction.



If you thrive in a fast-paced, collaborative environment and are dedicated to providing an outstanding customer experience, we would love to hear from you.



To apply: Please submit your resume and cover letter detailing your relevant experience.

title: Head of Transformation
description:
SBFM is the fastest growing, owner operated Soft Facilities Management service provider in the UK and we are looking for an experienced Head of Transformation to join our team. 



The Head of Transformation is responsible for leading and delivering large-scale operational change across the business, driving strategic initiatives that support the company’s continued growth and operational scalability. 



A key priority of the role will be overseeing the end-to-end mobilisation of new client contracts across up to 500 sites, ensuring a seamless transition from contract award to fully operational service delivery. This includes establishing structured mobilisation programmes, coordinating cross-functional teams, and ensuring all sites are operationally ready at launch. 



Beyond contract mobilisation, the Head of Transformation will lead and deliver wider transformation initiatives across the organisation. This includes improving operational processes, implementing scalable delivery frameworks, and driving projects that enhance efficiency, service quality, and organisational capability as the business continues to scale. 



Duties and Responsibilities 



Lead complex, end?to?end transformation programmes, managing multiple concurrent initiatives while overseeing planning, budgets, timelines, risks, and overall delivery to ensure successful execution and alignment with strategic business objectives. 



Identify and deliver operational improvement initiatives that increase efficiency, consistency, and service quality across the business. 



Define project scope and deliverables while leading cross-functional teams and holding stakeholders accountable for commitments, ensuring coordinated execution and operational readiness across all departments 



Lead contract mobilisation programmes for new client wins across up to 500 sites, ensuring successful launch from contract award through to operational delivery. 



Establish scalable mobilisation frameworks and processes that support the company’s continued growth. 



Engage senior stakeholders, clients, internal teams, and external partners to ensure clear communication, transparent progress reporting, and strong alignment with project objectives and overall business goals 



Demonstrate the SBFM values and lead by example at all times. 



Qualifications and Skills 



Strong proven experience in project or programme management, ideally delivering large, complex, multi-site initiatives. 



Proven ability to mobilise or implement operational contracts within service-based industries (e.g., facilities management, cleaning, hospitality, logistics or outsourcing). 



Strong understanding of all aspects of project delivery including planning, governance, stakeholder management, risk management, and benefits tracking. 



Skilled in creating visual dashboards, Gantt charts, and executive-level presentations using Microsoft 365 tools. 



Highly organised with excellent attention to detail and ability to communicate clearly at all levels. 



Confident managing multiple priorities and navigating fast-moving environments. 



Experience driving operational improvement and transformation initiatives working with cross-functional and remote teams. 



Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. 



A people-person with a collaborative approach who thrives in high-energy teams. 



Familiarity with budgeting and financial tracking. 



Commitment to SBFM Values 



Be a Good Person 



We give people opportunities and embrace their inherent goodness. We are open minded and uphold integrity. We are respectful and considerate. We are kind and appreciative. 



Play as a Team 



Community and communication is everything. We remain inclusive within our company and with our clients. Together, we grow, retain, execute, and make an impact. We are one team. 



Think Differently 



We encourage a growth mindset, everything can be improved through effort. We love innovation and ideas. We are disruptors, and push boundaries for sustainable growth.  



Make an Impact 



It’s all about the ultimate goal. We exceed expectations and deliver results at pace. We challenge the norm and step out of our comfort zone, because at our core, we are passionate and love to win.

title: US Recruiting Sourcer / Talent Researcher – Remote | $400–$600 USD
description:
US Talent Researcher / Recruiting Sourcer – Remote | $400–$600 USD

Discover the professionals leading major construction projects across the United States.

Help identify the Project Managers, Superintendents, and leaders who build hospitals, stadiums, and large commercial developments.



If you enjoy research, solving puzzles, and finding hard-to-locate professionals online, this role will be exciting and rewarding.

You’ll work with a U.S. executive recruiting team that places leadership talent at construction companies across the country.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys digging deep, uncovering talent, and building organized pipelines of candidates.



Strong performers can grow into Senior Sourcer or full-cycle Recruiter roles over time.



***What You'll Be Doing***

• Research and identify construction professionals across the United States

• Use LinkedIn, ZoomInfo/Apollo, and advanced search techniques to find candidates

• Build structured candidate pipelines for active recruiting projects

• Organize and track talent information inside Google Sheets or CRM

This role is research-driven and detail-focused.

***Helpful but not required***

***Compensation and Growth***

Base salary: $400–$600 USD per month depending on experience

Career path toward Senior Sourcer or full-cycle Recruiter roles



***Work Schedule***

***How to Apply (Follow Exactly)***

title: Financial Controller (UK, QuickBooks, GHL)
description:
Little Pixies Studios is on a mission to make every child become the hero of their own story through magical photography experiences.



At Little Pixies, we don’t just hire for open roles. We hire for impact. If you’re exceptional at what you do and align with our core values: Competitive Greatness, Sincere Candour, and Unimpeachable Character, we want to know you.



Important: Do NOT apply if you have not previously worked on UK accounts, UK VAT, and QuickBooks Online in a meaningful hands-on way.



This is not a junior bookkeeping role. We need someone who can understand business reality, spot where the numbers are wrong, fix broken finance processes, and build a finance function leadership can trust.



Role

We’re looking for a Part-Time Financial Controller to join our team.



This is a senior hands-on finance role because we do not just want someone to maintain the books. We want someone who can take ownership of the numbers, fix what is currently broken, and help us build a cleaner, more reliable finance function over time.



In the beginning, this is a hands-on fixing role. You will be responsible for getting deep into our current accounting setup and helping us solve real operational finance problems, including:



GoHighLevel to QuickBooks Online sync issues

Incorrect handling of discounts and VAT

The correct accounting treatment for in-house layaway / payment plan arrangements

Reconciliation and treatment of multiple payment providers and lender flows

Improving the reliability of month-end reporting

Making sure VAT is being handled properly and consistently

Over time, you will help us build the machine. That means improving controls, standardising workflows, documenting processes, strengthening reporting, and helping us create a finance setup that is accurate, understandable, and scalable.

This is an ownership role. You will be accountable for the quality of the books, the integrity of the balance sheet, the reliability of management reporting, and the financial processes that support the company.



Who this role is for:

You are a top performer at your current company or with your current clients.

You have strong hands-on experience in senior bookkeeping, finance operations, or financial controller responsibilities.

You have worked on UK entities and understand UK VAT, MTD, and the realities of running finance in a real operating business, not just in a textbook.

You are highly competent in QuickBooks Online.

You are comfortable getting into messy situations and fixing them properly.

You understand that good finance is not just about bookkeeping accuracy. It is about understanding the real business process underneath the numbers.

You are methodical, commercially aware, and able to think clearly through complexity.

You are comfortable being held to a high standard.

You like responsibility.

You want to be judged on results.



Responsibilities:

Own the integrity of the finance function on a day-to-day basis

Review, fix, and improve the current QuickBooks Online setup

Investigate and stabilise the GoHighLevel to QuickBooks Online workflow so transactions, discounts, VAT, and totals are flowing correctly

Define and implement the correct accounting treatment for in-house layaway / instalment arrangements

Build and maintain a clean accounting structure for multiple payment providers, including reconciliations, clearing accounts, fees, settlements, refunds, and chargebacks where relevant

Ensure VAT treatment is correct and that MTD filing is clean, timely, and supportable

Own monthly reconciliations and month-end close discipline

Prepare clear monthly management reporting that leadership can rely on

Work with leadership to identify where current financial reporting is weak, inaccurate, delayed, or misleading

Document finance processes and create SOPs so the finance function becomes more repeatable and less person-dependent

Work effectively with external accountants where needed, while being capable of challenging poor advice or weak execution

Advise on whether QuickBooks remains the right platform long term, and if not, help evaluate and support migration to a better system

Help create a finance function that can scale without becoming sloppy, confusing, or fragile



Results:

QuickBooks Online becomes accurate, clean, and trustworthy

Balance sheet accounts are properly reconciled and understood

GoHighLevel to QuickBooks transactions are mapped correctly and produce reliable outputs

Discounts and VAT are handled correctly and consistently

A documented and repeatable layaway / payment plan accounting workflow is implemented

Payment provider flows are properly reconciled and do not create ongoing confusion at month-end

VAT is filed correctly and on time with proper audit trail and support

Monthly management reporting is delivered consistently and leadership can rely on it

Finance processes become clearer, more controlled, and less dependent on ad hoc fixes

Over time, meaningful improvement in the quality, speed, and reliability of the entire finance function



Requirements:

title: Creative Strategist for ecom brand
description:
Who We Are

We're an e-commerce brand in the tech/outdoor/hobby space looking for a Creative Strategist to join our team on an ongoing basis. You'll be responsible for writing ad scripts and developing creative angles that drive sales.



What You'll Do



Write 20+ ad scripts per week (UGC scripts, static ad concepts, video ad hooks, etc.)

Research competitors, trends, and winning ads in our niche

Develop fresh creative angles and messaging strategies

Collaborate with our team to keep content performance improving





Requirements (Please Read Carefully)



You MUST have experience as a Creative Strategist for e-commerce brands. This is not a junior or entry-level role. We need someone who has done this work before and can show results.

You MUST have worked with tech, outdoor, or hobby brands/products. If your experience is only in fashion, beauty, or food — this is probably not the right fit.

You MUST send your full portfolio with your application. This can be a link to a Google Drive, Notion page, personal website, or PDF — whatever works. Just make sure we can see real examples of scripts, creative strategies, or ad concepts you've created.



?? Applications without a portfolio will NOT be reviewed. No exceptions.



How the Hiring Process Works



You apply and include your portfolio

We review your work

If we like what we see, we'll give you a paid test project

If the test goes well, you join the team on an ongoing retainer

Payment will be processed through Upwork for both the test and ongoing work





Good to Know



This is a part-time, ongoing role — not a one-off project

We value speed, creativity, and someone who understands what makes people click and buy

You should be comfortable writing a high volume of scripts weekly

Reliable communication and meeting deadlines is a must





How to Apply

Send a message with:



A brief intro about yourself

Your experience with e-commerce creative strategy (specifically for tech/outdoor/hobby products)

Your portfolio link or attached portfolio (again — no portfolio = no review)



We're excited to find the right person for this. If you love writing ads and thinking about what makes people buy — we want to hear from you.

title: Administrative Assistant
description:
Virtual Assistant / Administrative Assistant

Armco Aquatics | Remote | Full-Time



About Armco Aquatics

Armco Aquatics is a 25-year-old aquarium installation and maintenance company dedicated to making it easy for clients to own their dream aquarium. We serve residential and commercial clients with a small, tight-knit team built around four core values: caring, consistency, craftsmanship, and curiosity. We run a professional operation with real systems, clear processes, and a culture that takes quality seriously.



The Opportunity

We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant / Administrative Assistant to join our team and take ownership of the day-to-day administrative tasks that keep our operation running smoothly. This is a support and execution role — not an operations management or leadership seat. If you love checklists, clean records, and closing loops completely, this role was built for you.

You'll work closely with our Office Manager (and directly with our Founder during the onboarding period) to handle routine administrative work so our leadership team can stay focused on growing the business.



What You'll Do

Communication handling — Answer incoming calls and
s using approved scripts, provide routine information, and route non-standard requests to the correct tea
mber

Job creation — Check accepted estimates and create jobs accurately in our field service software (Service Fusion)

Scheduling support — Maintain company calendars; update appointments, reminders, and key administrative dates

Customer follow-up — Send job confirmations, appointment reminders, and routine follow-up communications

Onboarding admin — Complete customer and employee onboarding steps using approved checklists; maintain personnel files and onboarding packets

Purchasing support — Create purchase orders from approved requests and place pre-approved routine orders within defined spending limits

Record keeping — Maintain organized digital files, update templates, compile administrative data, and enforce document version control

Team communication — Update internal communication channels (Google Chat) with approved routine notices



What This Role Is Not

This is a checklist-driven execution seat, not a decision-making role. You will not own operational priorities, financial control, HR decisions, or leadership systems. When something falls outside your approved SOPs, you escalate — quickly and clearly. That's a feature, not a limitation.



What We're Looking For

Must-haves:

Strong attention to detail — data accuracy is non-negotiable in this role

Excellent written and verbal communication in English

Comfortable working independently from documented SOPs and checklists

Reliable, consistent, and responsive during agreed working hours

Experience with Google Workspace (Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Chat, Google Drive)

Comfortable learning new software (we use Service Fusion for field service management)

Nice-to-haves:

Prior experience in a home services, field service, or trade-based business

Experience with CRM or field service software

Bookkeeping or purchase order processing experience

Character traits that thrive here:

You follow the process first and ask questions when something's unclear — you don't guess

You close loops; things don't fall through the cracks on your watch

You communicate proactively when something is off or you're blocked

You take pride in clean, accurate records



Performance Standards

You'll be measured on:

Response time to routine phone and
 inquiries (within agreed service standard)

Job creation accuracy from accepted estimates

Calendar, file, and personnel record accuracy

Onboarding packet completion timeliness

Administrative task completion rate by due date

Escalation compliance — exceptions routed correctly without missed handoffs



Compensation & Details

Type: Remote / Virtual

Hours: [Full-time]

Rate: [Competitive — based on experience]

Schedule: [Monday–Friday, hours TBD]



How to Apply

Please submit:

A brief introduction describing your relevant administrative experience

Your resume or work history

Any tools or software platforms you are proficient with

Your availability and desired hours/rate

We respond to every applicant. We're looking for someone who will grow with us — if you're dependable, systems-oriented, and take quality seriously, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Property Management experienced in Rentec Direct
description:
About Us



Crown Realty Experts is a professional U.S.-based real estate company providing residential and commercial property management services. We are seeking an experienced, detail-oriented Property Manager Assistant who is highly familiar with online property management software and capable of handling a fast-paced, high-volume workload with precision.



This position requires excellent organizational skills, strong communication, and the ability to work independently while following very clear instructions. Applicants must also have prior experience in lease and tenant management.



Key Responsibilities



Manage daily operations inside platforms like AppFolio, Rentec, Buildium, or similar



Answer tenant and owner inquiries via phone and



Schedule repairs and coordinate with vendors for maintenance requests



Prepare lease renewals and monitor lease expirations



Assist with rent collection processes and leasing activities



Maintain digital files and tenant records



Perform basic bookkeeping and accounting functions



Respond to occasional emergency calls (paid extra for after-hours coverage)



Support other administrative tasks as needed by the real estate team



Minimum Requirements



At least 1 year of experience using an online property management portal



Accounting or bookkeeping background



Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)



Strong attention to detail and ability to follow multi-step processes



Ability to self-manage time and tasks with minimal supervision



A friendly and professional demeanor



Access to a quiet work environment and stable internet



Willingness to handle minimal after-hours calls (with premium pay)



???? Compensation



Rates are based on experience level and proven ability:



$5.00 – $7.00/hour – Beginner (1–2 years of experience)

Solid foundation in real estate or property management support. Able to handle routine admin tasks, data entry, and basic tenant/vendor communication. Willing to learn new systems.



$7.25 – $8.50/hour – Intermediate (3–5 years of experience)

Strong background in property management support, social media execution, and real estate admin. Comfortable with multiple software platforms. Demonstrated reliability and consistency.



$8.50 – $10.00/hour – Expert (6+ years of experience)

Proven track record in property management, real estate operations, and commercial real estate support. Skilled at handling complex admin systems, creating SOPs, and managing multiple properties or accounts with little supervision.



Application Instructions – Read Carefully



Applicants who do not follow the instructions below will not be considered.



Begin your cover letter with this exact phrase as the title:

BEST ASSISTANT – I Use [Insert Portal Name]

(Example: BEST ASSISTANT – I Use Buildium)



In your cover letter, include at least six bullet points that clearly explain how your experience aligns with the job description above. Each point should be specific and relevant.



You must also include:



Your updated resume



Your DISC profile results (screenshot or link)



Confirmation that your OnlineJobs.ph profile is 100% complete with education, job history, background confirmation, and skills



A statement of which property management portal(s) you’ve used and for how long



Confirmation of your availability for CST-based work hours and minimal after-hours support



Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.



Hiring Process



Application and material review



Skills test related to property management tasks



Scenario-based interview



Paid trial assignment



Final onboarding



Note: Initial pay is set during onboarding based on the compensation tiers above.



Performance Review Metrics (90 Days)



Accuracy of lease and billing tasks



Timeliness of maintenance coordination and communication



Recordkeeping and task organization



Proactive support and ability to follow through



Professionalism and reliability under time pressure

, WhatsApp, and scheduled Zoo
etings. This will include some overlap with the US time zone.

1. A short note explaining why you are the right person for this position

2. Any additional information you deem relevant

title: ELITE VIDEO EDITOR
description:
ELITE VSL VIDEO EDITOR WANTED



We need ONE world-class VSL Direct Response editor for our D2C E-commerce brand.



- THE OPPORTUNITY:



Position: Direct Response VSL Video Editor (Health/Pain Relief Specialist)

Commitment: Long-term creative partnership (not freelance)

Compensation: $1,200-$1,500 monthly + performance bonuses

Location: 100% Remote & Flexible

Hours: 40h/week

Market: English-speaking



- HERE'S WHAT MAKES THIS DIFFERENT:



While other companies treat editors like replaceable contractors, we're building an elite creative partnership. You'll own a piece of our explosive growth.



Your Monthly Earnings Potential:



Base Salary: $1,000-$1,500

+ Performance Bonuses, based on VSL conversion rates

+ Annual Increases: 10-20% year-over-year growth for strong performance



- THE MISSION:



Transform Pain Into Freedom. We don't just sell products. We literally change lives.



- WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR (BE HONEST, WE'LL VERIFY)



MUST-HAVE Experience:



2+ years Direct Response VSL editing (health/pain relief preferred)

Proven track record with 5+ minute retention-focused VSL's

Advanced motion graphics & 3D animation skills

AI video tool experience (Veo V3, HeyGen, etc.)

Proficiency: CapCut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects



STRONG PREFERENCE:



Understanding of pain relief marketing psychology

/Instagram ad optimization knowledge

Medical/health content editing background



- WHAT SETS YOU APART:



You understand that every cut, transition, and overlay affects conversion rates

You obsess over scene-script matching (e.g., "cervical spine" = 3D neck animation)

You add red pain indicators, motion effects, and retention hooks instinctively

You study successful health VSLs to understand winning patterns



ATTENTION:



We receive 50+ applications per post. Only 2-3 get interviews.



What makes the difference?



Portfolio quality over quantity

Demonstrable health niche experience

Understanding of Direct Response psychology

Genuine passion for helping people escape pain



Warning: We move fast. The best candidates often get hired within a week of applying.?



Start your proposal with "DOMINATE" so we know you’ve read the full description.

title: Senior SEO Specialist Needed – Technical + Strategic Execution (Ongoing)
description:
Senior SEO Specialist Needed – Technical + Strategic Execution (Ongoing)

We are looking for an experienced SEO professional to own and execute a structured monthly SEO program.



This is not a task-based backlink role.



We want someone who understands search strategy, technical SEO, and sustainable organic growth.



Scope Overview

Monthly campaign structure includes:

~40 priority keywords

5 core landing pages

Full technical audit and implementation

On-page optimization

Strategic link acquisition

Monthly performance reporting

This is a long-term engagement for the right person.



What We Expect

You should be able to:

Conduct a proper technical audit and prioritize fixes

Improve site architecture and internal linking

Optimize landing pages for intent, not just keywords

Build high-quality backlinks through legitimate outreach

Track rankings, traffic, and conversions

Provide clear monthly reporting with insights, not just metrics

We care about quality, sustainability, and measurable growth.



Requirements

5+ years proven SEO experience

Strong technical SEO capability

Experience with structured link acquisition and outreach

Fluent with GA4, Search Console, and leading SEO tools

Ability to explain strategy and tradeoffs clearly

White-hat methods only

If your approach relies on bulk directory submissions or low-quality networks, this role is not a fit.



What Success Looks Like

Steady improvement in rankings and organic traffic

Clean technical foundation

Authority growth through credible links

Clear reporting tied to business impact



To Apply

Please include:

2–3 examples of SEO projects you’ve led

A sample report (redacted is fine)

Your approach to link building in 2026

Your monthly retainer expectation

We are looking for a strategic partner, not a volume executor.

If you take pride in disciplined, long-term SEO work, we’d like to talk.

title: Full time AI video creator
description:
Hiring: AI Content Creation VA (Short-Form Video)



We are a social media content company that creates short-form video content for health and wellness brands on Instagram. We use AI tools to generate images, voiceovers, talking head videos, and motion clips, then edit everything together into finished Instagram Reels.



This is a long-term position, not a one-time project.



What you will be doing:



- Using AI tools to generate realistic images of characters (Nano Banana Pro)

- Generating natural sounding voiceovers (ElevenLabs)

- Creating talking head videos (HeyGen)

- Generating motion video clips (Google Veo 3)

- Editing everything together into polished short-form videos (CapCut or your preferred editing software)

- Using Claude AI to write prompts and improve your work quality



You do not need prior experience with these specific tools. We have a full 9-stage onboarding program that trains you on everything step by step. But you do need to be someone who learns fast and pays attention to detail.



What we are looking for:



- Reliable and consistent. You show up every day and communicate if something comes up. This is the number one thing we care about.

- Detail-oriented. The difference between a good video and a bad one comes down to small details.

- Coachable. You take feedback seriously and apply it to your next video.

- Has their own laptop or desktop computer with a stable internet connection.

- Has their own video editing software (CapCut works great).

- Can follow instructions carefully without needing to be told the same thing twice.



Schedule:



Daily check-in at 9:00 AM PHT. All work for the day must be completed and submitted by 8:00 PM PHT.



Pay:



$500/month.



Onboarding:



Before you start producing content, you will go through our 9-stage onboarding program. This usually takes about 5 days to complete and covers every tool and skill you need. Onboarding is unpaid but mandatory. It is designed to fully prepare you so you can do the job at a high level from day one.



To apply:



Do not just send me a message saying you are interested. To be considered for this position you must complete the following test assignment and include it in your application:




 



Applications without the completed assignment will not be reviewed. This is how we filter for people who actually pay attention and follow instructions.



If you have any questions about the role, include them in your message along with your completed assignment.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Hard Sales Representative / Closer – Remote
description:
About the Role:

We are looking for a high-performing, results-driven Sales Representative who is confident on calls, thrives under targets, and knows how to close. This is not a passive customer service role — this is a high-activity, hard-sales position focused on converting leads, handling objections, and driving revenue.



If you are competitive, resilient, and motivated by performance and commissions, we want to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities:

* Conduct outbound sales calls and follow-ups

* Close warm and cold leads

* Handle objections and push deals forward

* Hit daily call and sales targets

* Manage pipeline and update CRM

* Book and close appointments

* Follow structured sales scripts and processes

* Maintain consistent follow-ups

* Track and report sales performance



KPIs & Expectations:

* High daily call volume

* Consistent outreach activity

* Conversion and close rates

* Revenue generated

* CRM accuracy

* Follow-up discipline

* This role requires urgency, persistence, and confidence on the phone.



Qualifications:

* 2+ years in sales, closing, or hard outbound roles

* Strong English communication skills

* Neutral or American accent is a strong plus

* Comfortable with cold calling and rejection

* Proven track record of hitting targets

* Competitive and results-oriented mindset

* Coachable and able to follow scripts/processes

* Able to work US business hours



Technical Requirements:

* Computer (8GB RAM or higher)

* Noise-canceling headset

* Webcam

* Stable high-speed internet

* Quiet workspace

* Backup internet/power preferred



How to Apply?

Reply to this job post with:

* UPDATED Resume

* UPDATED professional intro video (1–2 minutes)

* In your video, please include:

* Your hard sales / closing experience

* What products or services you’ve sold

* Your average daily call or outreach numbers

* Your sales results (appointments, revenue, conversions, etc.)

* How you handle objections and rejection

* One fun fact about yourself

* Why you’re confident you can hit targets in a high-performance sales role



This role is for strong salespeople who are confident, consistent, and ready to perform. If you’re driven by targets, not afraid of rejection, and serious about closing deals, we’d love to meet you.

title: Social Media Strategist + Content Creator (Luxury Local Brand)
description:
Light Up Your Holidays | Chicagoland | Woman-Owned | Indoor + Outdoor Holiday Lighting



Light Up Your Holidays is a premier, woman-owned holiday lighting and décor company serving the Chicagoland community since 2001. We create high-end lighting displays that elevate homes, businesses, and entire neighborhoods - and we’re ready for our social media presence to match the level of our work.



We’re looking for a social media strategist + creator who knows how to build massive engagement, views, and community collaboration - not just “post consistently.”



We already have the magic: stunning installs, premium clients, a powerful mission, and a mountain of photo + video content. We also leverage AI tools (including ChatGPT) to support writing and output.

Now we need your creative vision and execution to turn it into a content engine people can’t stop watching and sharing.



Who You Are

You’re not just a creator — you’re a strategic content architect.

You’ve worked on large national brand social media (or at that level) and understand what drives algorithmic performance without sacrificing authenticity.



You know how to:



Build content that hooks fast

Make storytelling feel real (not cheesy)

Turn everyday footage into must-watch video

Create a community that feels connected to the brand



You’re highly visual, self-driven, and obsessed with results.



What You’ll Do

1) Social Media Strategy + Content Execution

Develop weekly + monthly content strategy aligned with our brand voice and business priorities

Create and publish content across platforms (Instagram, TikTok,
, YouTube Shorts as needed)

Design content series + recurring formats (so we’re not reinventing every week)

Create strong CTAs that drive saves, shares, comments, DMs, and bookings



2) Hook + Viral Content Development

Hooks are EVERYTHING here. You should be excellent at developing:



High-retention opening lines + visuals

Trend-informed content that still feels premium + on-brand

“Stop-the-scroll” patterns and storytelling arcs



We are specifically looking for someone who can bring advanced creative tools and techniques to elevate output.



3) AI-Powered Content Expansion

We want AI used intelligently — to scale and sharpen content while keeping it authentic.

You will:



Leverage AI tools to enhance editing speed, creative concepts, and content variations

Repurpose assets into multiple formats

“Supersize” our content production while maintaining a real, high-end look



4) Brand Storytelling + Community Collaboration

Pull the story out of the work (before/after, transformation, behind-the-scenes, client reactions)

Create audience connection through authentic narrative + brand personality

Engage with followers and build community 
ntum

Generate collaborative content ideas with our audience



5) WordPress Website Support

We want you as our one go-to creative + designer, including:



WordPress content updates

Landing pages and/or site refreshes as needed

Portfolio / gallery updates using our photo + video assets



What We’re Looking For



? Required:



Experience managing or creating for major/national brand social media

Proven ability to drive engagement + views (real examples required)

Strong short-form video editing skills

Excellent creative instincts + taste (luxury vibe matters)

Strong communication and follow-through

WordPress experience



???? Bonus points:



Motion graphics experience

UGC-style editing

Experience in luxury home services, design, architecture, lifestyle or events

Photography or videography skillset

Experience building content calendars + creative direction



About Our Business

We don’t just sell a product — we create a feeling.



We offer services year-round including:



Holiday lighting (residential + commercial)

Indoor/outdoor seasonal décor

Permanent architectural lighting

Bistro lighting and outdoor ambiance lighting



This is a creative playground — with real budget, real assets, and a brand worth building.



Compensation

Hourly pay (based on experience)

Plus performance-based success commissions tied to results



This starts part-time and is designed to move into full-time for the right person.



How To Apply

Please submit:



Your resume

Examples of your work (links, reels, campaigns, accounts)

To jump ahead in the interview process: send a 2–10 minute video introducing yourself and answering:



What national brand(s) have you worked with (or at that level)?

What results have you driven (views, engagement, growth)?

Why are you interested in Light Up Your Holidays?

What would you bring to this role that others won’t?

title: TikTok Affiliate Support Assistant for Our Brand Account
description:

title: We're Hiring: Facebook Ads Media Buyer
description:
Meta Ads Media Buyer — Marketing Agency | Remote | $1,500–$2,000/month



What We Do



We run Meta ads for outdoor living contractors (pergolas, pools, turf, pavers, outdoor kitchens) across the US. Our model is simple: we generate leads, our setters book appointments, contractors close deals. We charge per appointment. If the ads don't perform, clients leave. If they perform, clients stay and grow. The media buyer is the most important role in our company.



What You'll Own



You will manage 15–25 Meta ad accounts independently. That means:



Campaign strategy, setup, and optimization across all accounts. You d
 what to test, when to scale, when to kill. Nobody is going to tell you what buttons to press.



Creative direction: You write briefs for our video editor, review output, and d
 what runs. You don't need to edit video, but you need to know what converts.



Cost per lead and cost per appointment are your numbers. You own them. If CPL is high, you fix it. You don't wait for someone to tell you there's a problem.



Landing page and lead form optimization. You'll work inside GoHighLevel (GHL) to build and test funnels. If you haven't used GHL, that's fine. But you need to understand funnel logic.



Who This Is For



You've managed Meta campaigns for local service businesses. not ecom, not info products, not dropshipping. Local. You understand targeting, lead forms vs landing pages, and why cost per lead alone is a bad metric without conversion data behind it.



You can look at an ad account and within 10 minutes tell me what's wrong and what you'd test first. Not because you read it in a course.



You don't need to be managed. You need to be pointed in a direction and left alone to produce results. If you need daily check ins and hand holding, this is not the role.



Who This Is NOT For

If you completed a Meta ads course and now call yourself a media buyer, don't apply!



If your experience is boosting posts for restaurants, don't apply!



If you need someone to review every decision before you make it, don't apply!



Compensation

$1,500–$2,000/month depending on experience. This is a full-time remote position. We're a small team that communicates on Slack. We don't do daily standups or unnecessary meetings.



We do results.



Apply here: 



We care if you can think independently and deliver results. If that's you, apply. If you're not sure, it's probably not.
