title: Marketing Automation Specialist (AI and Workflow Systems)
description:
On the Performance & Automation team, the Marketing Automation Specialist (AI & Workflow Systems) will design, build, and optimize automation workflows that improve marketing operations, reporting, and decision-making across the agency.



This role sits at the intersection of marketing, systems thinking, and AI. You will focus on translating business logic and performance marketing needs into scalable automation systems using tools such as n8n, Make, and Zapier.



In this remote role, you will work closely with the CEO and performance team to connect data sources, streamline workflows, and build intelligent systems that enhance speed, accuracy, and overall client impact.





About Us

Rubix is a performance marketing consultancy focused on helping high-growth DTC brands scale profitably. We combine deep analytics, strategic media buying, and a growing layer of AI-powered automation to help our clients—and ourselves—move faster, smarter, and leaner.



We are evolving into an AI-first consultancy, building systems that turn data into decisions. Our approach is grounded in ownership, accountability, and continuous experimentation to drive measurable growth.



At Rubix, we don’t just execute campaigns—we build infrastructure that scales performance.





You Will

Automation & Workflow Development

- Build and maintain automation workflows using low/no-code tools such as n8n, Make, and Zapier

- Design systems that connect marketing platforms and trigger automated actions based on performance data

- Translate business and marketing requirements into scalable automation logic





Data Integration & Systems Design

- Connect platforms such as Meta Ads, Google Ads, Klaviyo, Shopify, and reporting tools to centralize data

- Develop structured workflows that ensure consistent, reliable data flow across systems

- Design and maintain dashboards and alert systems to monitor KPIs and campaign performance





AI & Process Optimization

- Leverage AI tools such as ChatGPT and Claude to assist in reporting, summarization, and insight generation

- Identify operational bottlenecks and implement automation-driven solutions

- Continuously explore and implement new tools and systems to improve efficiency and output





Collaboration & Execution

- Work closely with media buyers and strategists to implement automations that improve campaign feedback loops

- Translate technical workflows into clear, business-friendly outputs

- Support cross-functional execution by ensuring systems align with marketing objectives





You Have

- 3+ years of experience in marketing operations, automation, or systems-focused roles

- Hands-on experience with automation platforms such as n8n, Make, or Zapier

- Strong understanding of API concepts and integration logic

- Familiarity with performance marketing platforms such as Meta Ads, Google Ads, Klaviyo, and Shopify

- Experience working with Google Sheets, Airtable, or similar toolsStrong understanding of marketing metrics such as ROAS, CPA, CAC, and LTV

- Ability to interpret marketing data and translate it into actionable workflows

- Strong written and verbal English communication skills





We Prefer

- Experience working in performance marketing agencies or high-growth environments

- Familiarity with tools such as 
 or similar data aggregation platforms

- Basic knowledge of Python or deeper API integrations

-  Experience building reporting systems, dashboards, or alert frameworks

- Experience leveraging AI tools to enhance workflows, reporting, or decision-making

- Strong curiosity and habit of staying up to date with trends in AI, automation, and marketing systems





Compensation

Compensation for this role will be based on experience, technical expertise, and scope of responsibilities. 



We are open to both full-time and fractional engagements (~30+ hours per week) and will align on a structure that reflects the value you bring.



This is a remote role with a strong preference for candidates based in Latin America and requires 4–5 hours overlap with EST.



At Rubix, you will work closely with leadership in a high-ownership environment where speed, clarity, and initiative are valued. This role offers the opportunity to build impactful systems, shape internal infrastructure, and play a key role in the evolution of an AI-first performance marketing organization.

title: Chapter 11 Legal Assistant
description:
About Us: We are a fast-growing U.S. law firm focused on helping individuals and businesses get a fresh start through bankruptcy. We handle high-level Chapter 11 cases and are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented tea
mber to join us long-term. This is not a basic admin role — this is a critical position that works directly with financial documents, attorneys, and clients.



Why This Role is Different: This is a long-term, stable position with a clear growth path into senior roles. You will receive direct training from our experienced U.S. legal team, gain valuable financial and legal experience, and take ownership of real cases rather than just completing tasks.



Position Overview: You will be responsible for managing Monthly Operating Reports (MORs), reviewing financial documents, coordinating with clients, and helping keep Chapter 11 cases on track. This role requires someone who is highly detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable reviewing bank statements and financial reports.



Core Responsibilities: Manage Monthly and Quarterly Operating Reports by collecting documents starting on the 1st of each month and following up with clients on the 10th, 15th, and 20th; review bank statements for inconsistencies or unusual transactions and request explanations from clients when needed; compare MORs against bank statements to ensure accuracy and proper balancing; review MORs to confirm all questions are answered correctly; attach all required financial documents for business cases and prepare cash receipt and disbursement reports for individuals; track deadlines and enforce compliance, including sending late notices after the 21st and escalation
s if documents are not received within 48 hours; coordinate attorney review prior to filing and file MORs and QORs while maintaining an accurate tracking system. Handle client communication by following up persistently to ensure timely document submission, sending escalation notices when needed, and eventually leading client onboarding and instruction calls once trained. Assist with fee applications by preparing interim and final applications, coordinating with accounting after fee approvals, and ensuring clients receive copies and hearing notices. Support new Chapter 11 case setup by scheduling initial meetings with attorneys, setting up client folders, sending intake forms and document requests, following up until all required documents are received, and confirming required insurance coverage prior to filing. Provide administrative support by scheduling client calls, petition reviews, and follow-ups, scheduling 341 meeting preparation calls, and handling mailings and address updates.



What We’re Looking For: Strong understanding of financial documents such as bank statements and basic reports; extremely detail-oriented and organized; excellent written English and professional communication skills; ability to follow structured processes and meet deadlines; comfortable managing multiple cases at once; proactive mindset with strong follow-up habits.



Bonus (Not Required): Experience in accounting, bookkeeping, or finance; experience working with U.S. law firms; familiarity with bankruptcy or legal processes.



KPIs for Success: Percentage of MORs and QORs filed on time; client response turnaround time; error rate in filings; number of follow-ups required per client; accuracy of financial reconciliation.



Compensation & Growth: Competitive salary based on experience with opportunities for performance-based increases; long-term role with growth into a senior case manager position; ongoing training and increased responsibility over time.



How to Apply: Please include a short introduction describing your experience with financial documents, an example of a task where you reviewed or reconciled numbers, and your internet speed and home office setup.



Quick Note: We are looking for someone who takes ownership, follows through, and takes pride in getting things right. If that sounds like you, this can become a long-term and rewarding role with our firm.

title: Customer Success Manager (Digital Marketing SaaS)
description:
About Us



We are a leading SaaS loyalty, marketing, and customer engagement platform serving retailers and brands across highly regulated industries in the U.S. and Canada. We help businesses strengthen customer relationships through data-driven marketing, automation, and analytics—driving retention, growth, and revenue.



We are seeking a highly proactive Account Manager / Customer Success Manager to own and grow a portfolio of mid-market and SMB retail clients. This is a commercially focused role responsible for driving platform adoption, retention, and revenue expansion while serving as the primary strategic advisor to clients.



The ideal candidate has experience in digital marketing or loyalty SaaS platforms and is comfortable leading ROI-driven conversations that connect campaign performance to business outcomes. This role requires a consultative, data-driven professional who can proactively mitigate churn risk and guide customers toward long-term success.







What You'll Do



- Own and manage a portfolio of approximately
SMB and mid-market retail accounts, serving as the primary relationship owner.

-Drive retention, renewals, and revenue growth through proactive account management and expansion opportunities.

- Lead monthly ROI and performance conversations, connecting
, SMS, and loyalty campaign metrics to business outcomes.

- Proactively monitor account health, identify churn risks early, and execute mitigation plans before renewal cycles.

- Guide customers on digital marketing best practices, campaign optimization, and platform adoption strategies.

- Conduct regular business reviews focused on engagement metrics, click-through rates, and revenue impact.

title: Short-Form Video Editor for Social Media Ads (Long-Term Work)
description:
We’re looking for a video editor who can turn raw footage into high-retention short-form videos used for social media and paid ads.



This is ongoing work for someone who understands pacing, captions, and what keeps viewers watching.



If you’re consistent, detail-oriented, and can match a specific editing style, we’d love to see your work.







???? Please read the full job description below and complete the test edit to apply:



Video Editor for Short-Form Social Media Ads (Part-Time / Long-Term)

About Strehl Media

Strehl Media is a video marketing company based in Tampa Bay, Florida that helps service-based businesses grow through strategic content and paid ads.

We work with industries like roofing, HVAC, construction, and other local service businesses that want to become the best-known brand in their market.

Our content is designed to generate leads, build authority, and drive real business results, not just views.

We’re looking for a reliable, detail-oriented video editor who can help us produce high-quality short-form content consistently and grow with us long-term.



Responsibilities

Edit short-form videos (30–90 seconds) for:

• Instagram Reels

 • YouTube Shorts

 •
 / Instagram Ads

Your edits should include:

• Clean jump cuts for strong pacing

 • On-screen captions that are easy to read and engaging

 • Subtle zooms or motion to keep viewer attention

 • B-roll or supporting visuals when appropriate

 • Highlighted keywords in captions to improve retention

You will be provided with:

• Raw footage

 • Editing example

 • Caption style references

 • Brand guidelines



What We’re Looking For

You’re a good fit if you:

• Have experience editing short-form social media content

• Understand pacing, hooks, and viewer retention

• Can follow an existing editing style

• Deliver projects on time

• Communicate clearly and reliably

• Can match a specific editing style consistently (not just freestyle editing)



Required Skills

• Adobe Premiere Pro

• Ability to add captions and basic motion graphics

• Understanding of short-form video pacing and retention

Bonus if you understand social media advertising and marketing psychology.



Pay Structure

Starting Pay:

$20 per edited video

Most videos are 30–60 seconds and follow a consistent editing style.

Performance Raises:

Editors who consistently deliver high-quality work for 3–6 months may increase to $25 per video.

Long-Term Opportunity:

Editors who work with us 12+ months and perform consistently well can increase to $30 per video or more.

Our goal is to build long-term relationships with reliable editors, not constantly rotate freelancers.



Example Editing Style

Here is an example of the type of editing style:



Your goal is to match the caption style, pacing, and overall feel of this type of video.



Required Test Edit

To apply, please complete the short editing test below.

Download the raw footage here:


 

Edit the video to match the style shown in the example above.

Submit your finished edit by
ing it to:



Applications without a completed test edit will not be considered.



How to Apply

Please include:

• Your name and location

• Links to examples of your previous editing work

 • Your editing software of choice

 • Your completed test edit



Why Work With Us

• Consistent monthly projects

 • Long-term opportunity

 • Clear editing systems and style guidelines

 • Work with a growing media company in the U.S.

If this sounds like a good fit, we look forward to seeing your work.

title: Video Editor - Meta Ads/VSL
description:
Hi, I’m Zebbi.



I’m not looking for a video editor who just cuts clips together. I’m looking for someone who understands marketing — someone who knows why a clip is used, not just how to place it.



We’re a small but serious Italian team selling a niche health product in the US. We’re 6 guys, 22 to 27 years old, and if we work together, you’ll mostly be working directly with me, the head editor.

Right now we mainly produce VSLs (usually 5–7 minutes, sometimes shorter or longer) and some UGC-style ads. The main goal is conversion on Meta ads.



---



What we need is: 

- strong clip selection, 

- clean editing, 

- subtitles, 

- sound effects, 

- simple transitions when needed, 

- and most importantly someone who is creative but also thoughtful. 

- You need to understand the script and make smart editing choices, not just execute. 

- Some familiarity with AI is also important since we’re integrating it more and more into the workflow.



We work with clear briefs and clear instructions, but this is important: you won’t just assemble clips. You’ll need to think, make decisions, and sometimes find the right footage yourself. A lot of material will be in our drive, but not everything.

Workload depends on the period. Right now it’s around 1–2 videos per week, usually around 5 minutes each. When we scale, it can go up to 4–5 videos per week. Payment is per video, paid weekly or monthly depending on what you prefer.

You can find the detailed payment structure here (rates increase as you improve):



There is real room for growth and stability here for the right person.



---



Step 1 — Answer these questions (If you don't answer all the questions, we won't contact you.):



1) Which AI tools are you familiar with, and which ones do you currently use or have used in your workflow?

2) What kind of ads have you edited the most: VSLs, UGC, direct response ads, brand ads, or something else?

3) How fast can you usually deliver a 5–7 minute VSL if the brief is clear? We’re looking for a simple edit, but well thought-out and intentional.

4) Send 2–3 examples of ads you edited that you think are your strongest work.



---



Step 2 — Test task (important):



We ask you to edit a main video of around 1:15 plus 6 hooks.



Brief Link: 

In the brief you’ll find basically everything you need to know. If you have any doubts, feel free to ask me anything.



Also, when do you think you would deliver the video?



---



Once you send it, we’ll review the work carefully. If needed, we may ask for revisions. Then we’ll test it on Meta and evaluate both the quality of the edit and how it performs.

If you’re just looking for random editing gigs, this is probably not for you.

If you’re hungry, smart, fast, and want to grow into a killer direct-response editor, there could be a real opportunity here.



Send your answers and start the test when ready.

title: UGC & Project Manager
description:
What this position is responsible for:



We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive UGC & Project Manager to oversee creator relationships and manage the operational flow of UGC campaigns. This role plays a critical part in ensuring that creator partnerships, campaign deliverables, and internal collaboration run smoothly from start to finish. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced digital marketing environment, is detail-oriented, and can confidently coordinate between creators, internal teams, and clients to ensure campaigns are executed at a high standard.



Requirements/Experience:

- 1–3+ years of experience in UGC management, influencer marketing, social media marketing, or digital marketing operations



- Experience sourcing, recruiting, and managing UGC creators or influencers across platforms such as TikTok and Instagram



- Strong project management and organizational skills, with the ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously



- Excellent communication and negotiation skills when working with creators and coordinating with internal teams



- Ability to manage timelines, deliverables, and campaign documentation with a high level of attention to detail



- Familiarity with social media trends, creator ecosystems, and UGC-style content



- Experience reviewing content and ensuring it follows brand guidelines, scripts, and campaign briefs



- Proficiency with project management tools, spreadsheets, and communication platforms (e.g., Google Sheets, Notion, Slack, Trello, etc.)



- Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to identify risks, delays, or bottlenecks early



- Self-starter mindset with the ability to work independently in a remote environment





Roles & Responsibilities for this position:



UGC Management



- Source and recruit high-quality UGC creators across platforms such as TikTok, Instagram, and other relevant social media channels to support ongoing campaigns.



- Build, maintain, and continuously grow a reliable roster of creators, ensuring access to talent that aligns with brand positioning and campaign goals.



- Conduct creator outreach and relationship management, including communication, negotiation of deliverables, and maintaining professional partnerships.



- Distribute campaign briefs, scripts, and brand guidelines to creators, ensuring all expectations and creative requirements are clearly communicated.



- Review and evaluate creator submissions to ensure content meets campaign standards before forwarding for internal or client approval.



- Track and document creator performance, reliability, and content quality to inform future collaborations.



- Maintain and organize creator databases, ensuring accurate records of contact details, past performance, and campaign participation.



Project Management



- Coordinate campaign timelines and deliverables between creators, internal team members, and clients to ensure smooth campaign execution.



- Monitor campaign schedules to ensure all deliverables are completed on time and meet required deadlines.



- Organize and maintain campaign assets and documentation, including briefs, scripts, and project files.



- Track overall project progress, proactively identifying potential delays, bottlenecks, or issues that may impact timelines.



- Communicate updates across teams to maintain alignment and ensure all stakeholders are informed throughout the campaign lifecycle.



- Support the overall campaign workflow by ensuring tasks, deadlines, and responsibilities are clearly defined and executed.



Apply today to join our team!



Notes:



Candidates must be available to work Central Standard Time (CST) business hours.

Schedule: Full-time

Target Start Date: ASAP

title: Replo Landing Page Developer
description:
We're looking for a Replo Landing Page Developer who will play a critical role in turning high-level creative concepts into conversion-focused, revenue-driving eCommerce experiences. This role sits at the intersection of design, development, and performance, ensuring that every landing page is pixel-perfect, on-brand, and optimized to convert traffic into customers. You’ll be directly responsible for building, optimizing, and maintaining Shopify landing pages that support aggressive growth goals for modern eCommerce brands.



Requirements/Experience:

- Proven experience building Shopify landing pages using Replo

- Strong ability to translate Figma designs into pixel-accurate, responsive live pages

- Hands-on experience with Shopify-native functionality, including products, variants, carts, and checkout flows

- Solid understanding of conversion rate optimization (CRO) principles for eCommerce

- Experience building responsive layouts for desktop, tablet, and mobile

- Familiarity with brand guidelines, design systems, and UI standards

- Ability to use AI tools to increase efficiency, speed, and consistency in workflows

- High attention to detail with a strong eye for design accuracy and usability

- Ability to manage multiple builds simultaneously while meeting deadlines

- Clear communication skills and comfort collaborating with designers, marketers, and strategists



Roles & Responsibilities for this position:

- Build high-converting eCommerce landing pages in Replo, using Figma designs as the source of truth while ensuring clean, scalable builds that align with performance goals



- Translate Figma files into pixel-accurate, fully responsive Replo pages, ensuring consistency across desktop, tablet, and mobile experiences



- Implement Shopify-native functionality within Replo, including product selection, variants, add-to-cart behavior, and checkout flows that function seamlessly for the end user



- Ensure all pages strictly follow brand guidelines, design systems, and UI standards, maintaining visual consistency and professionalism across every build



- Optimize page layouts using CRO best practices, including above-the-fold clarity, strategic CTA placement, trust elements, and friction reduction



- Leverage AI tools to improve development efficiency, speed up repetitive tasks, and enhance overall output quality without sacrificing accuracy



- Collaborate with designers and performance marketers to ensure pages not only look great but are built to support testing, iteration, and measurable results





Notes:



Candidates must be available to work Central Standard Time (CST) business hours.

Schedule: Full time position

title: Integrator — Visibility, Content & Growth (Personal Brand)
description:
ABOUT THIS ROLE

I am building something meaningful.

A personal brand and education company centered around wealth, identity, expansion, and helping people step into their biggest lives.

This is not a typical assistant role.

I am looking for someone who wants to help build a movement — someone who sees the bigger picture, loves turning ideas into execution, and is excited by growth.

You will work closely with me as we expand visibility, scale programs, grow community, and create work that impacts thousands of people.

If you love being part of something that is growing, evolving, and meaningful — this may be a beautiful fit.



WHAT YOU WILL OWN

You help translate vision into execution.

This includes:

Content & visibility?• Managing social posting workflows?• Coordinating video and podcast editing?• Repurposing content across platforms?• Maintaining content calendar?• Tracking what performs

Podcast & media?• Podcast production coordination?• Repurposing episodes into clips?• Podcast outreach (booking guest appearances)?• Managing speaking / collaboration pipeline

Growth & outreach?• Supporting partnerships and visibility opportunities?• Researching outreach opportunities?• Suggesting ideas for growth and exposure?• Helping implement visibility strategies

Operations?• Turning ideas into task plans?• Creating simple systems and checklists?• Keeping projects moving forward?• Reducing bottlenecks?• Helping the business scale smoothly



WHO THIS ROLE IS REALLY FOR

You enjoy structure — but you also enjoy growth.

You like thinking about how things can improve.

You notice opportunities.?You bring ideas.?You take ownership.?You don’t wait to be told every step.

You want to grow with a business long term — not just complete tasks.

You are calm, organized, proactive, and excited to be part of building something meaningful.



EXPERIENCE

You have supported a creator, online business, or agency before.

You are comfortable with content workflows, project management, and learning new tools.

You don’t need to know everything — but you do need to be resourceful.



HUGE PLUS

Podcast workflow experience?Video editing coordination?Outreach experience?Launch support?Kajabi or course platforms?Basic analytics tracking



GROWTH

This role will grow into a key position with more ownership and leadership.

Salary increases with ownership and results.

I am looking for someone long-term who wants to build something meaningful together.



TO APPLY

Please include:

1. A short voice note introducing yourself

title: Paid Media Video Editor – Short-Form + Long-Form Expert
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled and detail-oriented Video Editor to join our creative team part-time. This role focuses exclusively on crafting video ads for paid social—ranging from short-form (6–30s) to long-form (30–120s) creatives. You will work closely with our Creative Strategist to turn structured creative briefs into visually engaging, high-converting ads for Meta platforms 
/Instagram), TikTok, and YouTube.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Edit and produce short- and long-form video ads using existing assets (video, UGC, b-roll, static)



Follow storytelling and performance frameworks (PAS, AIDA, Problem–Solution–CTA, testimonials, etc.)



Maintain visual appeal while focusing on performance optimization (e.g. scroll stop, pacing, retention)



Create multiple versions and formats for creative testing and platform variations



Implement precise feedback from Creative Strategist and adapt based on performance KPIs



Maintain organized file management, naming conventions, and follow SOPs



Ensure clean delivery of final files (ratios, subtitles, formats for Meta, TikTok, YouTube)



QUALIFICATIONS

Proven experience as a video editor for paid advertising (portfolio required)



Skilled in editing both short (6–30s) and long-form (30–120s) performance ads



Strong understanding of ad structures and conversion-focused storytelling



Proficient in editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut, etc.)



Precise, fast-working, structured, and responsive to feedback



Coachable and fast learner – understands instructions quickly and asks the right questions



Basic knowledge of creative KPIs (Hook Rate, CTR, Watch Time, etc.) is a plus



MUST ALSO HAVE:

A dedicated home office setup conducive to professional video editing tasks.

High-speed internet connection (over 50 Mbps).

A high-performance computer capable of handling extensive video editing software.



WORKING HOURS & COMPENSATION

Part-Time Position: ~4 hours per day (Mon–Fri), ideally between 9 am – 1 pm Manila Time

Compensation: $400 USD per month (with room to grow as performance scales)

Long-term collaboration preferred



HOW TO APPLY:

To be considered, please submit:

Your updated resume highlighting relevant experience



A 2–3 minute introduction video (uploaded to Vimeo or YouTube) – Tell us about your background and why you're a great fit



3–5 examples of video ads or social media campaigns you've edited



NOTE: Incomplete applications will not be considered. We are looking for someone who values clarity, precision, and creativity.

We are excited to review your creative and professional qualifications!

title: Instagram Content Posting VA (Google Drive + Scheduling Tool)
description:
Training Provided | Long-Term Opportunity | Growth to Full-Time



We are looking for a highly organised and reliable Virtual Assistant to help manage and schedule content across multiple Instagram accounts.



This is a simple but very important role within our company. Your main responsibility will be ensuring that content is uploaded, scheduled, and posted on time without errors.



You will be given clear step-by-step training and systems, so no previous experience is required. However, experience with content posting, social media scheduling tools, or Instagram management is a bonus.



The most important qualities we are looking for are:



• Strong organisation

• Ability to follow instructions carefully

• Good communication with tea
mbers

If you are someone who enjoys structured tasks and keeping things organised, this role will be a great fit.



We value long-term tea
mbers, and for the right person this role can grow into a stable full-time position with increased pay and bonuses.



Your Responsibilities



• Download content from Google Drive

• Upload and schedule posts using our scheduling software (
)

• Add captions to posts using our provided guidelines

• Ensure all posts are scheduled correctly and on time

• Keep track of content and posting schedules

• Communicate with tea
mbers if anything is missing or needs fixing



Everything you will do will be taught through clear training materials and systems.



Requirements



We are looking for someone who:



• Is very organised and detail-oriented

• Can follow instructions exactly

• Learns new systems quickly

• Communicates clearly with the team

• Is reliable and consistent with their work

• Has a stable internet connection



Bonus (not required):



• Experience as a content posting VA

• Experience using 
 or other scheduling tools

• Experience managing Instagram accounts



Pay & Hours



• Starting rate: $3 per hour

• Part-time to begin with



We believe in rewarding tea
mbers who grow with the role.



Typical pay progression:



Month 1–2:

$3 per hour (training and onboarding phase)



Month 3–6:

$3.50 per hour as responsibilities increase



Tea
mbers who perform well typically receive additional pay increases after the 3–6 month period, along with the opportunity for increased hours and additional responsibilities.



For the right person, this role can grow into:



• A full-time position

• Increased hours

• Performance bonuses

• Long-term stable work



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with our company long-term.



How to Apply



Please read carefully and follow the instructions below.

Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.





Step 1:



At the top of your application, write the word:



ORGANIZED



Step 2:



Use this format for the subject line of your application:



Content VA – Your Name – Organised



Example:



Content VA – Maria Santos – Organised



Step 3:



Answer the following questions:



1- Why do you believe you are a highly organised person? Give a short example.



2- Have you ever scheduled social media posts or managed accounts before? If yes, briefly explain. If not, that is completely okay.



3- Imagine you scheduled 10 posts for tomorrow and noticed that 3 of them are missing captions. What would you do?



Step 4 (Quick Caption Test):



Rewrite this caption so it sounds more engaging:



“New post is live. Go check it out.”



Step 5:



Please include your WhatsApp number so we can add you to our team communication group if you are shortlisted.



HIGHLY IMPORTANT TASK:



To help us get to know you better, please record a short video (30–60 seconds) answering the following question:



“Why is organisation important when scheduling social media content?”



Upload the link to your video in your application.



Applicants who DON'T complete this step will not be considered



Final Step:



At the very end of your application, include the sentence:



I am detail-oriented and ready to learn.



> Important: Applications sent within the first 10 minutes of posting will be reviewed first.





If you are reliable, organised, and eager to learn, we would love to hear from you.

title: Freelance Lightroom Editor Needed :)
description:
Hey there,



My name is Tamarah Christine, and I am a wedding and portrait photographer based out of Ontario, Canada. I’m currently looking for a dedicated photo editor to support me through my upcoming wedding and session season, with the goal of building a long-term working relationship.



For this year, I currently have 9 weddings booked between July–October (hoping to book more), along with additional sessions that will continue to be added. I am looking for someone reliable who can grow with me as my workload increases.



What I need help with:



- Editing approximately 500–800 images per wedding in Lightroom  

- Editing approximately 100–150 images per session  

- Using tools such as cropping, straightening, exposure adjustments, white balance, colour correction, and overall fine-tuning  

- Ensuring consistency in tone, mood, and storytelling across galleries  



Please note: I do not use AI editing tools — all edits are done manually to match my style. You will be provided with guidance and reference edits so you can align with my vision.



Compensation:



- $0.15 CAD per image edited    



Turnaround Times:



- Weddings: 12-14 business days  

- Sessions: 5-7 business days  



What I’m looking for:



- Reliable, organized, and detail-oriented  

- Strong sense of consistency and storytelling through editing  

- Able to take feedback well and apply it quickly  

- Meets deadlines and communicates clearly  

- Takes pride in producing high-quality work  

- Excited about editing emotional, cinematic wedding and lifestyle imagery  

- Interested in building a long-term working relationship  



What I’m NOT looking for:



- Someone who struggles with deadlines or communication  

- Someone who cannot take constructive feedback  

- Someone looking for inconsistent or very short-term work only  





If this sounds like a good fit, please reply with the following:



- What’s your
?  

- How long have you been editing for other photographers?  

- Are you ok with seasonal work being mainly from May–October?  

- Are you looking for a long-term, stable working relationship?  

- Does the $0.15 CAD per image edited work for you?  

- Are you ok with the required turnaround times for editing?  

- Do you have Lightroom and/or Photoshop?  

- Why are you excited to apply to this position? Why do you think you're a great fit?  

- Do you have a strong and reliable internet connection?  

- Can you share examples of edited work that you enjoyed working on?  

- What is an inspirational quote that makes you happy? :)  



---



I will only be responding to applicants selected for the next step in the process.



Looking forward to connecting,  

Tamarah Christine

title: AI-First Performance Graphic Designer
description:
We’re looking for an AI-First Performance Graphic Designer to own the creation of high-converting static ads for our e-commerce clients.



In this role, AI is a core part of your workflow — not a novelty. You’ll use it to generate bespoke assets, enhance product photography, and rapidly iterate on winning concepts. You should be able to move from a strategic brief to a polished, on-brand ad quickly and consistently.



We’re a high-output, performance-minded team that moves fast, tests constantly, and improves through iteration. If you’re the type of designer who loves shipping work, learning what wins, and leveling up quickly — you’ll thrive here.



This role starts part-time, but the goal is to ramp quickly. For the right person, this can turn into a long-term, high-trust position with meaningful growth and very strong compensation.





Schedule





Initial Phase: 20 hours/week (Part-time)

 Growth Phase: Ramp to 40 hours/week (Full-time) as workload and account ownership increase

 (Typical ramp timeline: 4–8 weeks depending on performance and volume.)



Key Responsibilities





1) AI Asset Generation & Engineering

Prompt Mastery: Use tools like Midjourney, DALL·E, and/or Adobe Firefly to generate high-quality product backgrounds, lifestyle environments, and visual elements that look premium and realistic.

AI Retouching & Expansion: Use AI tools (Generative Fill, outpainting, upscaling tools like Magnific, etc.) to:

enhance low-resolution product imagery

remove unwanted objects

expand backgrounds naturally

generate clean lifestyle placements

Style & Persona Variation: Create multiple “worlds” or personas for the same product (ex: minimal luxury vs. sporty vs. cozy home) to test what resonates with different customer segments.









2) High-Performance Ad Design

Direct Response Static Ads: Design scroll-stopping paid social statics (Meta/TikTok) including:

Benefit-led product statics

UGC overlay style ads

“Us vs. Them” comparisons

Feature/ingredient callouts

Press-style listicles and credibility layouts

Brand Integrity: Ensure AI-generated imagery matches each client’s brand identity — color palette, typography, composition, tone, and overall aesthetic.

Multi-Channel Assets: Create supporting visual assets when needed (landing pages,
, Pinterest, etc.).

Typography & Layout Excellence: Use strong hierarchy, spacing, contrast, and clarity so the ad is instantly skimmable and drives toward a clear CTA.









3) Data-Driven Iteration

Rapid Versioning: When something works, you can quickly create 5–10 high-quality variations (background swaps, new hooks, layout changes, alternate offer framing) to scale the winner.

Feedback Loops: Work closely with Creative Strategists and Media Buyers to make performance-based edits using real data (CTR, CVR, CPA, ROAS).









What You’ll Need (Ordered by Importance)

? AI Workflow Mastery





 AI must be a core part of your process. You should be able to show examples where AI materially improved speed and output quality.

? Design Software Excellence





 Strong command of:

Figma (layout + fast production)

Photoshop (image manipulation + polishing)

? Paid Social / DTC Experience (2+ years)





 You’ve designed ads for e-commerce brands and understand the difference between:

what looks “nice”

 vs.

what actually converts

? Conversion-Driven Design Thinking





 You understand hooks, messaging hierarchy, visual emphasis, and how to build ads that win attention in-feed.

? Speed + Reliability





 You can produce high volume without the work becoming sloppy or inconsistent.

? Clear Communication





 Great written and spoken English — you can handle feedback, ask smart questions, and move quickly async.What Success Looks Like

Predictable Output: You consistently deliver a high volume of strong creative weekly.

 Premium Quality: AI imagery looks believable, polished, and on-brand.

 Performance Mindset: Your work is built for results and improves through iteration.

 Efficiency: You continuously sharpen your workflow and shorten time from brief ? export.









How to Apply

Please send the following:

Portfolio link (must include paid social ad creatives)

2–3 examples where you used AI as part of the workflow. Briefly explain what tool(s) you used and why









Shortlisted candidates will be given a short paid test project (60–90 minutes) to evaluate speed, taste, and conversion-focused execution.

title: Remote Inside Sales Agent (Full-Time, PST Hours)
description:
**Work From Anywhere | Join a Fast-Growing Real Estate Investment Firm**



Are you a persuasive communicator who thrives in inside sales? Do you enjoy qualifying leads, setting high-quality appointments, and driving deals forward through consistent follow-up?



If you’re looking for a long-term remote career with a company that values growth, accountability, and integrity — this opportunity is for you.



About the Role

Position: Inside Sales Agent (ISA)

Location: Anywhere – 100% Remote

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM–5:00 PM Pacific Time

(Occasional weekend work up to 4 hours)

Work Hours: 40 hours/week



As an Inside Sales Agent, you’ll be the frontline sales professional responsible for handling inbound and outbound leads, qualifying motivated sellers, and setting appointments for our acquisitions team. You’ll play a critical role in driving revenue by ensuring only high-quality opportunities move forward.



You’ll work closely with a supportive, performance-driven team that values consistency, ownership, and continuous improvement.



Qualifications & Requirements 

* Minimum 6 months of experience as an Inside Sales Agent (REQUIRED)

* Experience handling high-volume inbound and outbound calls

* Background in real estate, wholesaling, acquisitions, or property sales is a strong plus

* Proven ability to qualify leads, uncover motivation, and handle objections

* Confident, professional, and persuasive phone presence

* Excellent English communication skills (clear, neutral accent preferred)

* Strong follow-up skills and ability to nurture leads over time

* Comfortable working with CRM systems, dialers, and lead management tools

* Highly organized, detail-oriented, and consistent with data entry and notes

* Self-motivated, reliable, and able to hit daily/weekly call and appointment targets

* Team-oriented mindset with a strong sense of accountability

* Positive attitude and genuine interest in building rapport and long-term relationships





Technical Requirements

* Reliable high-speed internet (minimum 50 Mbps) with backup connection

* Reliable laptop/desktop and smartphone

* Quiet, distraction-free workspace suitable for sales calls





About SV Ventures

SV Ventures is a California-based real estate investment firm specializing in residential fix-and-flip projects and new construction throughout the Bay Area. We manage the full lifecycle — acquisitions, design, renovations, and financing — and we’re growing rapidly.



Our culture is built on strong core values:

-Growth Mindset – We learn, adapt, and improve continuously

-Accountability – We take ownership and deliver results

-Relationships – We build trust through every interaction

-Transparency – We value honesty, integrity, and clear communication



If these values resonate with you, you’ll feel right at home here.



Compensation & Benefits

-Hourly Rate: $6–8/hour (based on experience)

-3th Month Pay Bonus (with the opportunity to earn beyond for exceptional performance)

-Property Sale Bonus: $50 per property sold (Average: 12–20 properties per year)

-Bi-weekly Pay

-Long-term, stable remote position with growth opportunities





How to Apply

Please submit the following:



1. Resume (PDF or Word format)

2. Screenshot of Internet Speed Test

3. Computer Specs (make, model, RAM, storage, year of manufacture)

4. 3-minute video (Loom or YouTube only) answering:

      -Tell us about yourself — your experience, education, and why you’re a strong fit for an Inside Sales Agent role

      -What do you believe are the most important qualities of a successful Inside Sales Agent?





Ready to grow with us?

Apply now and become part of a team that values your success as much as its own.



Join SV Ventures — where growth, accountability, and opportunity meet.

title: Remote Real Estate Sales Analyst (Full-Time | Benefits Included)
description:
Work From Anywhere | Join a Fast-Growing Real Estate Investment Firm



We’re looking for a detail-oriented Real Estate Sales Analyst to support our sales and acquisitions teams by running comps, analyzing property values, and delivering accurate market insights.



About the Role

Position: Real Estate Sales Analyst

Location: Anywhere – 100% Remote

Work Duration: 40 hours/week



In this role, you’ll focus on running comparable sales on MLS, Redfin, Zillow, evaluating property values, talking to agents to get info. and supporting deal analysis to help drive informed investment decisions.



---------------------------------------

Qualifications

-Minimum 6 months of experience in real estate, sales analysis, or a similar support role (REQUIRED)

-Strong understanding of real estate fundamentals, including property valuation and market comps

-Ability to accurately run comps and assess values using Zillow, Redfin, MLS, or similar tools

-Connect with real estate agents to get property sales info

-Experience supporting sales or acquisitions teams with analysis and due diligence

-High attention to detail with strong analytical and critical-thinking skills

-Comfortable working with large datasets and summarizing insights clearly

-Strong written and verbal communication skills

-Proactive, resourceful, and able to work independently with minimal supervision



---------------------------------------

Technical Requirements

-Stable, high-speed internet connection

-Reliable laptop or desktop computer and smartphone

-Proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets (basic formulas, pivot tables, formatting)

-Experience with real estate platforms (Zillow, PropStream, Redfin, or similar)

-Comfortable using tools like Slack, Zoom, and Google Workspace



---------------------------------------

Compensation

-$5-$7/hour (based on experience)

-13th Month Pay

-Bi-weekly Pay



Benefits Package (Applicable once the employee is regularized after the probationary period)

-10 days of paid time off (PTO)

-Maxicare health insurance coverage

-Sales bonus for every real estate property successfully sold

-SV anniversary gifts

-Birthday gift

-13th Month Pay, with the potential to earn two to three times the standard amount, depending on individual performance and overall company results



---------------------------------------

How to Apply - Please submit:

     1. Resume (PDF or Word)

     2. Internet speed test screenshot

     3. Computer specs

     4. Short video (Loom or YouTube) introducing yourself explaining your experience running comps and supporting real estate analysis





Ready to grow with us?

Apply now and join SV Ventures — where data-driven insights power smart decisions.

We are expanding our elite sales team and looking for a full-cycle Closer who can call inbound/warm opportunities, meet with them on Zoom, and close deals confidently.

Additional responsibilities include:

[!] This is not cold calling strangers. Every contact is warm, pre-educated, and entered by Setters, Webinars, or our Research team [!]

You don’t need to know our industry — but you must already know how to close.

- Flexible remote work with performance-based earnings



// Do Not Apply If You Are

title: EXECUTIVE VIRTUAL ASSISTANT — RIGHT HAND TO THE CEO
description:
EXECUTIVE VIRTUAL ASSISTANT — RIGHT HAND TO THE CEO

The Price Group (TPG) | Remote / Philippines | Full-time | $800–$1,200/month USD



WHO WE ARE

The Price Group is a fast-growing, remote-first Insurance Marketing Organization founded by David Price in 2018. We've produced over $70M in total insurance premium and operate with a high-performance, no-excuses culture built around one philosophy: Never Settle. David is a Forbes Business Council contributor and is actively expanding TPG into coaching and media.



We move fast. We hold ourselves to a high standard. And we're looking for someone who does the same.



THE ROLE

This is not a typical VA role. You will be the operational right hand of the CEO — the person who makes sure David can stay focused on the highest-leverage activities in the business and nothing falls through the cracks.



You will own his inbox, his daily priorities, and his calendar. You will be the connective tissue between David and every other tea
mber. You will know what's happening across recruiting, agent operations, content, and business development — and you'll make sure the right things get done by the right people at the right time.



This role is for someone who is obsessed with organization, proactive by nature, and calm under pressure.



WHAT YOU'LL DO EVERY DAY

• Own David's inbox — Sort, prioritize, draft replies, and achieve inbox zero daily. David should rarely need to open his own
.

• Morning briefing doc — Every morning before 8am ET, prepare a written briefing: today's priorities,
s needing David's input, calendar overview, and any urgent flags.

• Calendar management — Schedule, confirm, and protect David's time. Manage conflicts. Ensure prep materials exist before important meetings.

• Task follow-up — Track commitments David makes across
, Slack, and meetings. Follow up on open items so nothing gets dropped.

• CRM & data entry — Log notes, update records, and keep information clean across our systems.

• Triage & route — Direct incoming requests to the right tea
mber and follow up that they're handled.

• Research & prep — Light research for meetings, content ideas, travel, and business decisions.

• Special projects — Content operations, vendor management, and team coordination as TPG grows.



TOOLS YOU MUST KNOW

Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Docs, Sheets) |
 | Calendly | Loom | Notion or Airtable | Zoom

Nice to have: GoHighLevel, or insurance/financial services CRM experience.



WHO YOU ARE

• 3+ years of experience supporting executives or business owners as a VA or EA

• Excellent written English — your replies will represent David

• Available during EST business hours (9am–6pm ET, Mon–Fri minimum)

• Proactive by nature — you fix problems without being asked twice

• You take ownership and notice when things aren't done

• Comfortable with fast pace and ambiguity

• Excellent references from past employers



THIS IS NOT A FIT IF...

• You need constant direction to know what to do next

• You treat this like a side job

• You've never supported a CEO or business owner

• You're not comfortable handling sensitive business information



COMPENSATION & SCHEDULE

Pay: $800–$1,200/month USD (depending on experience). Paid bi-weekly.

Hours: Full-time, 40 hours/week. Core hours overlap with EST.

Start: ASAP. Paid 1-week trial before full offer.

Growth: We promote from within and reward performance.



HOW TO APPLY — READ THIS CAREFULLY

Your application must include ALL THREE of the following or it will not be reviewed:



1.
 the following to 
 with the word "Never Settle" in the subject line

2. Your resume (PDF preferred)

3. A Loom video (2–3 minutes): Introduce yourself, walk us through your most relevant EA/VA experience, and tell us one specific example of a time you prevented something from falling through the cracks for an executive you supported. And walk us through systems or process you would use to organize this CEO's life. 

4. Answer this question in writing (minimum 150 words): "A CEO you support receives 200
s per day. Walk me through exactly how you would set up and manage his inbox from Day 1."



IMPORTANT: Start your application message with the phrase "Never Settle" to confirm you read this entire post. Applications without this phrase will be automatically disqualified.

title: HIRING ASAP! Google Media Buyer (eCommerce)
description:
Help scale brands. Own performance. Drive real revenue.



GTE is a fast-growing global eCommerce company where great ideas don’t sit in slides — they turn into real, measurable growth. We build and scale online brands across international markets, and our tea
mbers take real ownership, grow fast, and help shape the future of the company.



We’re now looking for a performance-driven Google Ads Media Buyer to help take our main revenue channel to the next level.



Why This Role Matters

Google Ads drives around 90% of our total company revenue. That means your work won’t just “support marketing”, it will directly influence the growth of the entire business.



This role is perfect for someone who loves improving systems, scaling performance, and turning data into smarter decisions. You won’t just manage campaigns, you’ll help evolve the way we run Google Ads.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

From day one, you’ll have real ownership. Within your first 90 days, success in this role will mean:

- Developing and rolling out a new or significantly improved Google Ads strategy

- Restructuring and optimizing Google Shopping campaigns for stronger scalability and efficiency

- Driving measurable performance improvements, targeting a 20%+ increase in revenue from Google Ads

- Using performance data to continuously refine bidding strategies, campaign structure, and product feed performance



Your goal is simple: turn ad spend into scalable, profitable growth.



We’re excited to work with someone who:

- Has at least 3 years of hands-on experience in performance marketing or media buying

- Has direct experience running Google Shopping campaigns for large eCommerce catalogs (10,000+ products)

- Has managed high-budget ad accounts ($300K+ per month)

- Is highly proficient in Google Ads, Google Merchant Center, and Google Analytics

- Ideally has experience with Google CSS Labelizer

- Thinks analytically and uses data to drive decisions, not guesswork

- Enjoys testing, optimizing, and uncovering performance opportunities others might miss

- Is comfortable taking full ownership of results and being accountable for revenue impact



Hiring Process

As part of our process, shortlisted candidates will complete a 19-minute Google Ads knowledge assessment. This helps us understand your hands-on expertise before moving forward to the HR interview stage.





Ready to Grow With Us?

If you’re looking for a role where your work matters, your growth is supported, and your impact is visible — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Power Platform Analyst
description:

This role is perfect for someone who thrives at the intersection of business process and technical automation. You won't just be building apps; you will be architecting systems that bridge the gap between complex business requirements and high-performance digital solutions.

 

As a Power Platform Analyst, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and debugging automated workflows and data visualizations. You will work closely with stakeholders to translate their needs into scalable solutions using the Microsoft Power Platform and enterprise integration tools like Boomi. If you are a proactive problem-solver with a passion for APIs and automation, we want to meet you!

 

Key Responsibilities:

Solution Design: Translate complex business requirements into technical specifications and end-to-end solutions.

Automation & Integration: Build and maintain sophisticated workflows using Power Automate and integrate various systems via Boomi and APIs.



Data Visualization: Design and deploy insightful Power BI dashboards that drive data-informed decision-making.

System Debugging: Proactively identify, troubleshoot, and resolve issues within existing flows, apps, and integrations.

Process Optimization: Analyze current business processes and recommend automated improvements to increase efficiency.

Technologies You’ll Work With:

- Microsoft Power Platform: Power Automate (Flow), Power BI, and Power Apps.

- Integration Tools: Boomi (AtomSphere) and Custom API Connectors.

- Cloud Ecosystem: Microsoft 365, SharePoint, and Dataverse.



What We’re Looking For:

- Proven Experience: At least 2-3 years of experience building enterprise-grade solutions within the Power Platform.

Integration Expertise: Strong understanding of APIs and experience using middleware (like Boomi) to move data between systems.

- Analytical Mindset: Ability to "deconstruct" a business problem and rebuild it as a logical, automated process.

- Debugging Skills: A systematic approach to troubleshooting complex logic and connectivity issues.

- Communication: Excellent English communication skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.



Preferred but Not Required:

- Experience with DAX, Power Query (M), or basic JavaScript/JSON.

- Familiarity with ERP or CRM integrations.

mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:

title: Virtual CIO (vCIO) – Strategic IT Consultant
description:
We are seeking a strategic and business-minded Virtual CIO (vCIO) to serve as a high-level advisor for our diverse portfolio of business clients. In this role, you will act as an extension of our clients' executive teams, bridging the gap between their business goals and their technology infrastructure.

 

As a vCIO, you are not just a technical expert; you are a strategic partner. You will be responsible for developing long-term IT roadmaps, managing technology budgets, overseeing risk and compliance, and ensuring that every technical investment our clients make drives measurable business value. The ideal candidate has a deep understanding of Managed Services (MSP), excellent consultative skills, and the ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear business strategies.

 

Key Responsibilities

*Strategic IT Roadmapping & Planning

   - Conduct regular Strategic Business Reviews (SBRs) with clients to align technology with their 1–3 year business goals.

   - Develop and maintain comprehensive IT roadmaps, including hardware lifecycle management, cloud migrations, and 

     security enhancements.

   - Identify emerging technologies that can provide a competitive advantage or operational efficiency for specific client 

     verticals.

*Budgeting & Financial Management

   - Assist clients in developing and managing annual IT budgets.

   - Provide Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) analysis for new technology investments.

   - Help clients prioritize IT spending based on risk, ROI, and business impact.

*Risk, Security & Compliance

   - Oversee client security postures, ensuring alignment with frameworks like NIST, CIS, or industry-specific regulations 

     (HIPAA, PCI, SOC2).

   - Lead Disaster Recovery (DR) and Business Continuity (BC) planning and testing.

   - Act as a high-level advisor during security i
 or complex technical audits.

*Client Relationship & Account Leadership

   - Serve as the primary point of contact for executive-level stakeholders (CEOs, CFOs, Owners).

   - Monitor client satisfaction and service delivery trends, working with the technical team to ensure high standards are met.

   - Lead the technical onboarding of new high-value clients, setting the strategic foundation from day one.

*Vendor & Project Oversight

  - Assist clients in evaluating and managing third-party technology vendors (ISPs, Line-of-Business software, etc.).

  - Provide high-level oversight for major infrastructure projects to ensure they stay aligned with the strategic vision.

 

Qualifications

Required

- Experience: 7–10+ years of experience in IT leadership, senior systems engineering, or IT consulting (MSP experience is highly preferred).

- Strategic Mindset: Proven ability to develop long-term technology strategies that solve real-world business problems.

- Financial Literacy: Comfort managing budgets, performing ROI calculations, and discussing financial impact with executives.

- Communication Excellence: Exceptional ability to present to "C-Suite" executives and translate "geek-speak" into "business-speak."

- Broad Technical Knowledge: Deep understanding of Microsoft 365, Cloud Infrastructure (Azure/AWS), Networking, and Cybersecurity frameworks.

- Consultative Approach: Strong ability to influence stakeholders and lead through consensus and expertise.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

- Experience with ITIL frameworks or MSP-specific vCIO tools.

- Relevant certifications (e.g., CISSP, CISM, PMP, or advanced Microsoft/Cloud certifications).

- Previous experience in a "Fractional CIO" or "Account Lead" role within a technical service organization.

 

What Success Looks Like in This Role

- Clients view you as an indispensable member of their leadership team, not just a "vendor."

- Client IT environments are stable, secure, and proactively managed according to a documented roadmap.

- Technology spend is predictable for the client, with fewer "emergency" expenses.

- High client retention and growth through trusted, strategic recommendations.



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.

title: ???? Full-Time Video Editor (40h/week) for a Fast-Growing E-Commerce Startup ????
description:
?? Only apply if you have experience editing ad creatives for e-commerce performance marketing 
 Ads and Instagram Ads). We’re looking for someone who understands how to craft scroll-stopping videos that convert. Experience with DTC ecommerce brands is a must. 



Please apply here (required): 
 



At Skinnify, we’re reinventing fitness by integrating resistance into everyday clothing. In just two years, we’ve grown from 0 to 120,000+ customers – and we’re just getting started.

Here's a video about our company and what it's like to work on our team: 
 

Now, we’re looking for a full-time Video Editor (40 hours/week) to bring our ad creatives to life — someone who can take raw footage and turn it into powerful, polished videos that drive sales and build our community.



???? Your Responsibilities

? Edit high-converting video ads for
, TikTok, YouTube, and Google

? Bring creative briefs to life with fast, compelling edits that match the hook, angle, and storyline

? Work closely with content creators, creative strategists, and media buyers to deliver assets that perform

? Collaborate on new ad concepts and contribute creative input during brainstorming

? Stay ahead of platform trends, 
 culture, and editing styles to keep our content fresh

? Manage and organize video assets, templates, and versioning for efficient turnaround

? Continuously iterate based on data and feedback to improve performance



???? What We’re Looking For

?? Performance-Driven Editing – You know what keeps people watching and what drives clicks and sales

?? DTC E-commerce Experience – You’ve edited successful ads for other ecommerce DTC brands (fitness/fashion = big plus)

?? Fast Turnaround – You can edit fast without sacrificing quality

?? Strong Visual Taste – Your edits look polished, modern, and high-converting

?? Collaborative Yet Independent – You’re great at taking feedback, and even better at working on your own

?? Organized & Detail-Oriented – You don’t miss deadlines and your file management is on point

???? Mandatory Requirement

Candidates must be able to deliver 5–10 creative briefs per week, covering formats from 30-second videos to 2–3+ minute VSLs



???? Why Join Skinnify?

???? Work on Your Terms – Full flexibility. Work whenever and wherever you want, as long as you deliver results

???? Join a Hyper-Growth Brand – From 0 to 120,000+ customers in 2 years.

???? Make a Real Impact – Your edits will directly influence sales and brand growth

???? Take Ownership – You’ll have creative freedom to shape our visual style

???? Learn & Grow Fast – Collaborate with high-performing creatives, strategists, and media buyers



???????? The Skinnify Story

Skinnify started when our founder Christian realized most women wanted to get in shape but lacked the time or motivation for regular workouts. After training with resistance bands, he had an idea: what if resistance bands were built into leggings?

The result? Resistance Band Leggings – leggings that make every step a workout. Since then, we’ve launched sleeves, shoes, and more. Our mission is simple: make fitness effortless by turning movement into exercise.



???? Skinnify’s Core Values

???? Innovation – We design new, groundbreaking clothing with built-in resistance to revolutionize fitness.

???? Effectiveness – Our products help people burn more calories & get fitter with every step.

???? Accessibility – We make fitness accessible to everyone - even the busiest and least motivated.

???? Fun – We make exercise feel effortless and enjoyable.

? Quality – Our products are built to last - high-quality, durable, and reliable.



Ready to edit your way into the future of fitness? Apply now and let’s create something powerful.

title: Zoho CRM & Marketing Automation Assistant (Supporting Zoho Specialist)
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION



We are looking for a highly organised and detail-oriented Zoho CRM & Marketing Automation Assistant to support our existing Zoho Specialist.



You will be working directly under our Automation Manager, who is also based in the Philippines, assisting in building and managing our CRM systems, workflows, and marketing automations.



This is an execution-focused role. You will not be responsible for strategy, but you will play a key part in building and maintaining our systems accurately and efficiently.



ABOUT US



We are a UK-based company operating within the aesthetics and medical device industry.



We work with clinics across the UK, helping them grow through advanced technology, structured systems, and long-term business support.



We are currently scaling and building out our internal CRM and automation infrastructure.



YOUR ROLE



You will support our Zoho Specialist with:



Building and setting up
 campaigns in Zoho



Uploading and formatting
 sequences



Creating and organising contact lists



Setting up workflows and basic automations



Tagging and segmenting leads correctly



Testing automation flows before going live



Supporting CRM organisation and data accuracy



Assisting with funnel and campaign setup



IMPORTANT



You will be working under a structured system.



All workflows, logic, and automation strategies will be designed by our Zoho Specialist.

Your role is to execute tasks accurately and efficiently.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



Strong attention to detail



Ability to follow clear processes and instructions



Organised and reliable



Good written English



Comfortable working with systems and data



Experience with CRM platforms (Zoho preferred but not essential)



Able to work independently once trained



BONUS (NOT ESSENTIAL)



Experience with Zoho CRM, Zoho Campaigns or Zoho Flow



Experience building
 automations or workflows



Understanding of sales funnels or lead nurturing



Previous experience supporting a marketing or automation team



WORKING STRUCTURE



You will work directly with our Zoho Specialist (Philippines-based), who works Monday to Friday, 9am–5pm



You will also support our Marketing Manager, who is based in the UK



Tasks will be assigned daily or weekly with clear systems and processes in place



WORKING HOURS



Your working hours can be flexible and may extend beyond our Zoho Specialist’s schedule



However, you must be available to provide overlap and support during UK business hours when required



This ensures smooth communication with the Marketing Manager and wider team



EXPECTATION



You will act as additional support to ensure work continues efficiently across different time zones



There should always be coverage between Philippines and UK hours to keep projects moving



PAY STRUCTURE



Monthly salary



Opportunity for long-term growth as the company scales



HOW TO APPLY



Please include:



A short introduction



Any experience with Zoho or other CRM systems



Examples of automations or campaigns you have worked on (if available)



Your availability

title: Non-QM Underwriter
description:
We are seeking an experienced Non-QM Underwriter to join our growing team. 



This role is responsible for underwriting complex mortgage loan files that fall outside of traditional agency guidelines.

The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced environment, understands multiple investor guidelines, and can confidently assess borrower risk using non-traditional income documentation.



Key Responsibilities

Underwrite Non-QM mortgage loans including:

DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio)

Bank Statement (personal & business)

Asset Depletion / Asset Qualifier

Interest-Only and Jumbo Non-QM loans



Analyze borrower credit, income, assets, and collateral to determine creditworthiness

Review and interpret investor guidelines, overlays, and credit matrices (e.g., eResi, Acra, etc.)

Issue loan decisions including approvals, conditions, suspensions, and denials

Re-underwrite and clear conditions in a timely manner

Ensure compliance with ATR (Ability-to-Repay), company policies, and regulatory requirements

Maintain detailed underwriting notes and documentation for audit and secondary market review

Collaborate with Loan Officers, Processors, and Operations to structure loans effectively



Qualifications

3–7+ years of mortgage underwriting experience

Minimum 2+ years of Non-QM underwriting experience strongly preferred

Deep understanding of Non-QM loan programs and alternative income analysis

Experience working with multiple Non-QM investors and guideline overlays

Ability to manually underwrite complex loan scenarios

Proficiency with Loan Origination Systems (e.g., Encompass)

Strong analytical, decision-making, and problem-solving skills



Performance Expectations

Maintain consistent underwriting turn times (24–72 hours)

Meet productivity goals (3–6 loans per day depending on complexity)

Maintain high-quality underwriting with low defect rates

Effectively manage conditions and loan pipelines

title: Rockstar Cold Caller (Lead Gen & Outreach)
description:
I am looking to hire 2–3 high-performing Cold Callers to join our team for lead generation and outbound outreach.



This is not a beginner role. We need professionals who are comfortable navigating gatekeepers, handling objections, and closing for the appointment. If you are confident on the phone and know how to turn a "maybe" into a booked opportunity, we want to talk to you.



Position Details

Compensation: Competitive Hourly Rate

Growth: Rate increases based on performance, consistency, and KPIs

Environment: 100% Flexible Remote Work

Schedule: Must be available to work during US Business Hours (EST/PST)



What You’ll Do

Outbound Prospecting: Make high-volume cold calls to potential leads.

Engagement: Build immediate rapport and clearly articulate our value proposition.

Lead Qualification: Filter prospects and set qualified appointments.

Administrative Tracking: Keep activity logs updated in Google Sheets or our CRM.

Nurturing: Send professional follow-up
s to prospects after calls.

Reporting: Provide brief daily updates on call volume and outcomes.

Scripts and training materials are provided, but you must be able to think on your feet during live conversations.



What I’m Looking For

Proven Track Record: Solid experience in cold calling (Real Estate, SaaS, or Insurance experience is a plus).

Flawless Communication: Strong English verbal and written skills.

Resilience: A "thick skin" and a positive attitude toward handling rejection.

Reliability: High-speed internet, a quiet workspace, and a proven history of punctuality.

Data-Driven: Ability to meet daily/weekly KPIs and report data accurately.

Coachability: Open to feedback and willing to refine your pitch based on results.



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

To ensure you have great attention to detail (a must for this job), please follow these steps exactly:

Subject Line: Use the word “PINK” in your application title.

Voice Recording: Attach or link a 1-minute voice recording introducing yourself and highlighting your cold calling wins.

The "Why": Briefly explain what makes you more effective on the phone than other callers.



Note: Applications that do not follow these instructions or are missing a voice sample will be automatically disqualified.

title: Google Ads Assistant
description:
We're a fast-scaling DTC ecommerce brand doing 8 figures in revenue. We're looking for a Google Ads Specialist to own and optimize our paid search and shopping campaigns. This is a hands-on, execution-heavy role. You'll be in the account daily, making decisions that directly impact revenue. If you thrive on data, move fast, and want to work with a high-performance team -- this is for you.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:



- Build, manage, and optimize Google Ads campaigns across Search, Shopping, Performance Max, Display, and YouTube

- Monitor daily spend, ROAS, CPA, and conversion metrics -- flag issues before they become problems

- Conduct keyword research, build out ad groups, write ad copy, and manage negative keyword lists

- Set up and manage Performance Max campaigns including asset groups, audience signals, and feed optimization

- Manage Google Merchant Center -- troubleshoot feed errors, optimize product titles and descriptions for Shopping performance

- A/B test ad copy, landing pages, bidding strategies, and audience segments

- Build and maintain campaign reporting dashboards (Google Sheets, Looker Studio, or similar)

- Provide weekly performance reports with clear insights and action items -- not just numbers

- Collaborate with the creative and marketing team on ad assets, landing page recommendations, and promotional campaign setup

- Stay current on Google Ads platform updates, beta features, and best practices





REQUIREMENTS:



- Minimum 2 years hands-on experience managing Google Ads for ecommerce (DTC preferred)

- Proven experience with Performance Max, Shopping, and Search campaigns

- Strong understanding of Google Merchant Center and product feed optimization

- Comfortable with data -- you can pull insights from Google Ads, GA4, and Google Sheets without hand-holding

- Experience with bid strategies (tROAS, tCPA, Max Conversions) and knowing when to use which

- Ability to manage budgets ranging from $10K-$100K+/month

- Strong written English -- you'll be writing ad copy and communicating with the team daily

- Self-starter who doesn't need to be micromanaged -- you see a problem, you fix it





NICE TO HAVE:



- Experience with Shopify-based ecommerce brands

- Familiarity with Meta Ads or TikTok Ads (cross-channel understanding)

- Experience with Google Ads scripts or automated rules

- Knowledge of attribution modeling and how Google fits into a multi-channel media mix

- Google Ads certification





WORK SETUP:



- Full-time position

- Remote

- Must be available during US business hours for team communication and reporting

- Salary: [FILL IN]





HOW TO APPLY:



Send your resume along with a video explaining the follow to 
 

1. A brief summary of the Google Ads accounts you've managed (monthly spend, ROAS, industry)

2. One specific example of a campaign you optimized and the results you achieved

3. Your experience level with Performance Max and Shopping campaigns
