title: **Photo Editor + Instagram Reels Creator – Photography Studio**
description:
**Photo Editor + Instagram Reels Creator – Photography Studio**

**Location:** Remote

**Pay:** $4–$6/hr depending on experience

**Type:** Part-time, Long-term



---



**About the Role**



I run a professional photography studio in New Jersey specializing in corporate headshots, portraits, and weddings.



I’m looking for a reliable assistant who can handle both Instagram Reels creation and photo editing support — and switch between the two depending on workload.



You must be able to follow instructions closely, work efficiently, and deliver consistent results.



---



**Main Responsibilities**



**Social Media Content (Primary)**



* Create Instagram Reels from raw photo/video clips

* Select strong clips and build engaging short-form content

* Add cuts, pacing, and simple captions

* Execute hooks and edits based on direction



**Photo Editing Support (Secondary)**



* Lightroom color correction (exposure, white balance, cropping)

* Basic retouching using Evoto or Photoshop

* Wedding culling assistance when needed (Aftershoot)

* File organization and delivery prep



---



**Required Skills**



* Adobe Lightroom

* Experience editing photos of people (portraits or weddings)

* CapCut or similar video editing software

* Experience creating Instagram Reels or short-form content



---



**Bonus Skills**



* Photoshop or Evoto

* Aftershoot

* Wedding editing experience



---



**Work Structure**



When editing work is available, you will focus on photo editing and culling.

When editing is light, you will focus on Reels and social media content.



Workload varies week to week, so flexibility is important.



---



**How to Apply**



**Start your application with the word CONTENTEDITOR or it will not be reviewed.**



Then include:



1. A short introduction about your background

2. Examples of Reels or short-form videos you’ve created

3. Before/after photo editing samples (people only — no landscapes)

4. What software you used in your last editing job and what style you were asked to match

5. Any wedding editing or culling experience

6. Your hourly rate



---



**Important:**

Applications without examples or missing the keyword will be ignored.

/Instagram) ads

title: VSL VIDEO EDITOR — LONG-TERM PARTNERSHIP (E-commerce D2C)
description:
Let me be upfront with you, because that's how we operate.



We're a D2C e-commerce brand in the women's health space. We sell a product that genuinely helps people, and every piece of content we produce reflects that. No misleading claims. No bait-and-switch.



We're into a 5-year vision. We're scaling aggressively in the English-speaking market, and we need editors who grow with us, not editors who disappear when a bigger project comes along, and not a company that goes quiet after 3 months because the brand didn't work out.



We're in this for the long game. We want you to be too.



- THE ROLE:



Position: Direct Response VSL Video Editor (Health/Pain Relief Specialist)

Commitment: Full-time, long-term (this is not a freelance gig)

Compensation: $1,000-$1,500 monthly + performance bonuses

Location: 100% remote

Hours: 40h/week

Market: English-speaking



- WHAT LONG-TERM ACTUALLY MEANS HERE:



- Year-over-year salary increases of 10–20% for strong performers

- Performance bonuses tied directly to VSL and ad conversion rates

- Creative ownership, you won't be executing someone else's vision blindly. You'll understand the strategy, the avatar, the psychology behind every piece of content

- A real team, you'll work closely with the founder and marketing lead, not get lost in a ticket queue



- WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:



Non-negotiable:



- 2+ years editing Direct Response VSLs ads (health/women's wellness a strong plus)

- Proven retention, you understand why a cut happens at second 4, not just how to make it

- Proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects

- Experience with AI video tools (HeyGen, Veo, etc.)



Strong preference:



- You've edited ads that actually ran and converted

- You understand
/Instagram ad formats and platform behavior

- You've worked with health or wellness brands and know the compliance landscape



- WHO THRIVES HERE:



You care about the work beyond the deliverable. You watch your edited videos after they go live and wonder how to make the next one better. You understand that a 3-second hook isn't decoration, it's the difference between a winning creative and a dead one.



You want to be part of something being built, not just service it.



- WHO THIS IS NOT FOR:



If you're looking to freelance across 6 clients simultaneously, this isn't the right fit. We want someone who is genuinely invested in one brand's growth, because that's where the real upside is.



- THE PROCESS:



We review every application carefully. Portfolio quality matters far more than volume. If your work is strong and your approach is right, you'll hear from us within a week.



We move fast, but we don't rush the decision on people.



Start your application with the word "FOUNDATION", it tells us you read this and you understand what we're actually building.4

mbers

description:

This role involves creating high-quality marketing materials such as leaflets, posters, signage, and social media graphics, ensuring all designs are consistent with our brand.



You will work closely with the owner and become a key part of our team, helping us produce professional, modern, and effective marketing materials across multiple practices.



We are looking for someone who is organised, has a good eye for design, and can work efficiently using templates and brand guidelines.



Key Responsibilities:



- Design leaflets, posters, and signage using Canva

- Create social media graphics 
, Instagram)

- Update and adapt existing templates for new offers

- Maintain consistent branding across all materials

- Organise marketing files and assets

- Coordinate with external designers (if needed)

- Prepare files for printing

- Assist with basic marketing tasks (e.g. Google review materials)



Requirements:



- Strong experience using Canva (essential)

- Basic graphic design skills and good visual judgement

- Good written and spoken English

- Ability to follow brand guidelines and instructions

- Attention to detail

- Reliable and organised

- Previous experience as a Virtual Assistant or in marketing/design is preferred



Bonus (not essential):



- Experience working with healthcare or dental practices

- Basic knowledge of social media marketing

- Experience with tools like Google Drive, Trello, or similar



Start: Part-time (10–15 hours per week)

Opportunity to increase to full-time as the role grows



Salary:

Potential for increases based on performance and long-term commitment



HOW TO APPLY:

Please include:

- Examples of Canva designs (leaflets, posters, social media posts)

- A short introduction about your experience

- Your hourly rate

- The word “SMILE” at the top of your application (to confirm attention to detail)

title: Digital Marketer - Creatives & Website Management (Remote)
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. With decades of experience, including 50 years of expertise in garage conversions, we pride ourselves on impeccable craftsmanship, turning our clients' visions into reality while ensuring their properties remain in top condition.



Role Overview

We are seeking a creative and results-driven Digital Marketing Specialist to join our dynamic team. This role focuses on enhancing our online presence, managing multi-platform social media campaigns, and driving lead generation through strategic digital marketing initiatives. The successful candidate will be responsible for improving website visibility, creating engaging content, and managing targeted advertising campaigns across various platforms to expand our reach and grow our client base.



Key Responsibilities

SEO & Website Optimization

Social Media Management



Platform Management: Manage and optimize
, Instagram, and TikTok accounts for maximum engagement

Content Creation: Produce engaging posts, graphics, and short videos that align with brand messaging

Brand Consistency: Ensure consistent messaging and visual identity across all platforms



Digital Advertising & Campaign Management



Paid Advertising: Run targeted ads on Meta 
/Instagram), Google, and TikTok platforms

Campaign Development: Create and manage comprehensive digital marketing campaigns, with particular focus on fitness studio and related sectors

Content Management & Brand Development



Content Upload: Upload creatives, blogs, and campaign updates across digital platforms

Visual Content: Design and produce graphics, videos, and other visual content for marketing campaigns

Brand Messaging: Maintain consistent brand voice and messaging across all marketing materials



Required Skills & Experience

Technical Requirements



Digital Marketing: Proven experience in digital marketing, social media management, and online advertising

Platform Expertise: Hands-on experience with
 Ads Manager, Google Ads, TikTok Ads, and social media management tools

SEO Knowledge: Strong understanding of SEO principles, keyword research, and website optimization techniques

Creative Skills

Design Software: Proficiency with design tools such as Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar platforms

Video Editing: Basic video editing skills for social media content creation

Professional Skills



Campaign Management: Experience managing multi-platform advertising campaigns and budgets

Analytical Thinking: Strong analytical skills to interpret data and optimize campaign performance

What We Offer

Career growth potential within an expanding company

Instruction:

Please complete the attached application form and submit it along with your CV:

title: Retention Data Analyst (E-Commerce Subscription)
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a Retention Data Analyst specializing in subscription-based eCommerce. This role focuses on analyzing customer behavior, identifying churn patterns, and generating actionable insights to improve retention and lifetime value.



Key Responsibilities

• Monitor and analyze customer churn and retention metrics

• Evaluate cancellation trends and subscription behavior

• Work with Skio (subscription platform) to extract and interpret data

• Combine quantitative and qualitative data to identify root causes of churn

• Provide insights to improve customer lifetime value (LTV)

• Build reports and dashboards for retention performance

• Collaborate with marketing and creative teams for data-driven decisions



Requirements

• Experience in eCommerce or subscription analytics

• Strong understanding of churn, retention, and LTV metrics

• Experience with Skio or similar subscription platforms

• Strong skills in Excel, Google Sheets, or BI tools

• Ability to analyze both quantitative and qualitative data

• Analytical and detail-oriented mindset



How to apply:

1. Send the link to your updated resume

2. Why you're the best fit for the role?

3. Short video introduction discussing your relevant work experiences.

title: Property Management Operations Assistant
description:
About the Company



Providence Property Management is a a startup property management company based in Southwest Florida with a clear purpose: to deliver peace by stewarding real estate investments faithfully. We manage single-family homes and small multifamily properties across Charlotte, Desoto, and Sarasota Counties, and we exist to serve property owners through a structured, long-term rental management system that increases income, lowers losses, and provides superior service that far outweighs the cost.



As a growing company, we are actively building systems, refining processes, and assembling a team that will scale with us. The right person will not only contribute to daily operations but will also grow with the company over time.



The Role



This position is for an Operational Assistant. This is a jack-of-all-trades support role that assists with the day-to-day operations of the company, including leasing support, maintenance coordination, administrative execution, and general property management functions.



This is a highly tech-driven role. You will be working within multiple systems daily, including Notion, LeadSimple, Buildium, and other internal tools. You must be comfortable learning and operating within structured systems while maintaining accuracy and organization.



Your responsibilities will include, but are not limited to, coordinating maintenance requests, onboarding and off boarding clients, assisting with the leasing processes, updating and maintaining systems, documenting communication, performing data entry, and scraping and organizing lead data. This role supports the overall operations of the company and may include tasks that are not explicitly listed here as needs evolve.



This is a fast-paced environment that requires the ability to manage multiple responsibilities at once while maintaining a high level of accuracy. You must be able to move quickly without sacrificing attention to detail.



Success in this role is measured by outcomes, not effort. Tasks must be completed correctly, communication must be clear and professional, and systems must remain accurate and up to date at all times. Small mistakes are not small in this business.



Requirements



- High-level English proficiency (written and verbal, clear and natural communication)

- Strong attention to detail and ability to follow instructions exactly

- Proficiency in Google Workspace (Gmail, Google Docs, Google Sheets)

- Proficiency in ChatGPT and ability to use it effectively in daily work

- Fast and reliable internet connection (screenshot required)

- Quiet, distraction-free workspace suitable for professional communication

- Clear, high-quality audio for calls and recordings (no background noise or echo)

- Consistent responsiveness and reliability during working hours



Preferred experience includes familiarity with Notion, LeadSimple, Buildium, or similar CRM and property management systems.



How We Operate (Core Values)



Faithful Stewardship

“We believe our tea
mbers should act as they were the business/property owner. We value initiative over passivity, results over excuses, and longevity over short cuts. Our company’s compensation structures will always be aligned with this value.”



Operational Unity

“We believe the greatest marketplace advantage is a team that moves as one unit. We will seek to put the company as a whole above any private agendas, personal competitions, and even our own convenience. Clarity of vision, radical transparency and consistent communication will be a hallmark of our internal relationships.”



Personal Growth

“We believe the health of the company cannot exceed the health of its people. We are committed to the continual growth of every tea
mber, whether that’s professionally, personally, or spiritually. Coaching and reading will be a cornerstone in the life of all tea
mbers.”



These are the standards we operate by and the expectations we have for every tea
mber.



Good Fit



This role is best suited for someone who is looking for a long-term opportunity where they can grow within a company. You should be someone who takes initiative instead of waiting for direction, notices problems and works toward solutions, and values doing things right, not just getting them done.



You should be comfortable working within structured systems while also thinking independently. You should be able to manage multiple responsibilities without becoming disorganized or overwhelmed. You should take pride in your communication and understand that every message, update, and task reflects the company.



You should demonstrate strong problem-solving ability and resourcefulness, taking the initiative to figure things out and propose solutions rather than waiting for direction.



As you become more proficient and efficient in this role, pay increases are available, along with opportunities for promotion and specialization within the company as we expand.



This is a role for someone who is committed to growing within the same company, not someone who is actively shopping for the next best position.



Application Instructions



To apply, please submit your resume along with the following items. Please be careful to follow all instructions accurately to ensure your resume is considered.



- A video introducing yourself that is no longer than 60 seconds. Your video must have clear, professional-quality audio and must be recorded in a quiet, distraction-free environment. Submit your video in .WEBM format.

- An introduction letter that contains the following and begins with “I believe the operations assistant position is for me because”

    --- Review our three core values. Answer which of the three do you most align with and which do you least align with? Please give specific examples for both.

    --- A brief summary of your understanding of our company’s business model. For your research, we are called a “Fee-based, 3rd party, long-term, residential property management company”.

- Provide a screenshot of your internet speed test.

- Complete a DISC personality assessment and submit your results.



Final Note



We are not looking for the fastest applicant. We are looking for the most aligned applicant.



Take your time. Please follow the instructions carefully. 



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person. If selected, you will be part of a growing, system-driven company where your work matters and your development is taken seriously.



If this aligns with how you work and how you think, we look forward to reviewing your application.

title: Junior Designer
description:
About Us

We are an international award winning design firm that specializes in transforming short term rental properties into beautiful, functional spaces that stand out in the vacation rental market. Our goal is to create homes that feel special for guests while helping property owners increase bookings and revenue through thoughtful design.

Our team works remotely and collaborates on projects across different markets including mountain homes, beach houses, cabins, and city apartments.



Instagram





Job Overview

We are looking for a Junior Interior Designer who is excited to grow their skills and gain hands on experience working on real design projects.

In this role, you will support our design team with mood boards, sourcing, layouts, and presentations. You will work closely with our lead designers and project managers while learning the full process of designing high performing short term rental properties.

This is a remote position. We prefer someone who can overlap with US working hours. Preferred hours are 8 AM to 5 PM EST.



Key Responsibilities

Assist senior designers in developing design concepts for short term rental properties.

Create mood boards and visual presentations for client review.

Assist with space planning and layout development.

Prepare floor plans and basic 3D models.

Research and source furniture, lighting, decor, and accessories.

Organize product links, pricing, and specifications for procurement.

Support the design team with presentations and documentation.

Stay updated on design trends and inspiration, especially in hospitality and vacation rentals.

Design Tools and Software

Candidates should have experience with or willingness to learn the following tools

SketchUp, AutoCAD, Canva, Adobe Photoshop, Google Drive, Google Slides, Notion, Pinterest, Loom



Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Interior Design, Architecture, or a related field preferred.

1 to 2 years of design experience or internship experience.

A portfolio that shows your design thinking and creativity.

Basic knowledge of space planning and interior styling.

Strong attention to detail and organization.

Comfort working remotely and collaborating with a team.



Preferred Experience

Interest in short term rental or hospitality design.

Experience creating mood boards and presentations.

Basic experience sourcing furniture and decor.

Interest in staging spaces for photography.



Why Join Us

Work remotely from anywhere.

Be part of a collaborative and supportive design team.

Work on a variety of unique properties in different locations.

Opportunity to grow your design skills and take on more responsibility over time.



Application Process

To help us better understand your design thinking and workflow, candidates will be asked to complete a short design task assessment. This exercise allows us to evaluate creativity, problem solving, and attention to detail in a real design scenario.



To Apply:

Kindly fill out this form:

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Social Media + CRM + Admin Support)
description:
We are a growing U.S.-based real estate company in Atlanta, Georgia, United States looking for a long-term Virtual Assistant to help manage social media, marketing, CRM systems, and administrative tasks.



This position is ideal for someone who is organized, tech-savvy, creative, and interested in working in the real estate industry long-term.



We are looking for someone reliable who wants stable work, skill development, and long-term growth with our company.



Work Schedule: Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST (U.S. Eastern Time)



You must be able to work during these hours consistently.



Salary: Starting Pay: 

* $5 USD per hour (first 30 days)

*  After the first 30 days: $6 USD per hour

*  Future raises every 6 months.



We are looking for someone who wants long-term employment and growth.



Main Responsibilities: You will assist with the following marketing, social media, CRM management, and business administration tasks.



Social Media Management:

*  Schedule and post daily social media content

* Create real estate graphics using Canva

*  Create and Edit short-form videos using CapCut

* Create AI videos using HeyGen and Elevenlabs

*  Create TikTok property tour videos and Instagram Reels

* Monitor and respond to social media comments and messages

* Post updates about listings, open houses, and real estate tips

*  Research trending content ideas

*  Manage YouTube channel uploads

* Create short clips using Opus.pro

*  Help grow social media followers and engagement

*  Help run social media ad campaigns



Content Creation:

* Write blog posts and real estate articles

*  Assist with newsletter creation

*  Create marketing graphics

*  Prepare weekly
 newsletters

*  Assist with content for training materials and online courses



CRM & Real Estate Support:

*  Manage and maintain our real estate CRM

* Update contact records and ensure data accuracy

* Maintain Lofty CRM (we will train you how to use it)

* Create contact lists and databases

* Track marketing performance reports

* Help prepare business performance reports



Administrative Tasks:

*  Conduct online research

*  Create and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)

*  Organize digital files and marketing assets

*  Assist with client onboarding

*  Help with recruiting campaigns

*  Prepare weekly progress reports

* Help build and organize our internal knowledge hub



Tools We Use:



Experience with all these tools not required, but is highly desired:

*  Canva

*  CapCut

*  CRM systems 

*  WordPress

* ChatGPT

*  Hootsuite or other scheduling tools

* Constant Contact

*  YouTube tools (VidIQ helpful)

* Google Docs / Google Drive



Required Skills



We strongly prefer applicants who have:



* Real estate industry experience

*  Experience managing a CRM system

* Strong Canva design skills

*  Experience editing videos in CapCut

*  Excellent English communication

*  Strong organization skills

* Ability to follow instructions carefully

* Ability to work independently



Technical Requirements



You must have:

*  A reliable computer

*  Stable high-speed internet

*  A quiet workspace

*  Ability to work full-time during U.S. business hours



What We Are Looking For



We want someone who is:

* Reliable

* Detail-oriented

* Organized

* Creative

* Tech-savvy

*  Interested in long-term work



If you perform well, this role can grow into a long-term marketing manager role within our company.



How to Apply:



When applying, please include:

*  Your resume

*  Links to social media pages you have managed

*  Examples of Canva graphics you created

*  Examples of videos you edited in CapCut

*  A list of which of our tools you have used in the past

*  Please record a short 2–3 minute video introducing yourself and answering these questions:

1. Your experience working with real estate companies

2. Your experience using Canva and CapCut

3. Why you want this job

4. Which city in the Philippines you are located

*  Also include the phrase: “Lifestyle” in the first line of your application so we know you read the full job post.

Applications without this phrase will not be considered.



Bonus Points



You will stand out if you have experience with:

*   Real estate marketing

*  Instagram and YouTube channel management

*  AI video tools like HeyGen or Synthesia

*  Experience with Capcut

* Experience with Canva



If you are hardworking, organized, and excited about working in the real estate industry, we would love to hear from you.



Apply today!

title: Credit Repair Specialist
description:
Job Title: Credit Repair Specialist



Location: Work from Home (Remote)



Shift: 9AM to 5PM Eastern Standard Time (EST)



Employment Type: Full-Time



About Us:

We are a dynamic and growing company committed to helping our clients improve their credit scores and financial standing. We pride ourselves on delivering exceptional service and results through our expert team.



Position Overview:

We are seeking an experienced Credit Repair Specialist to join our team. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience and possess excellent communication skills. This is a remote position, requiring a high degree of tech-savviness and the ability to work during EST hours.



Responsibilities:

Analyze clients' credit reports and develop personalized action plans to improve their credit scores.

Communicate with clients via phone,
, and other channels to provide updates and support.

Dispute inaccuracies on clients' credit reports with credit bureaus and creditors.

Educate clients on credit-building strategies and financial management.

Stay up-to-date with industry regulations and best practices in credit repair.



Requirements:

Proven experience as a Credit Repair Specialist or similar role.

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

Tech-savvy with the ability to quickly learn and adapt to new technologies.

Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.

Availability to work during Eastern Standard Time (EST) hours.

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

A customer-centric attitude with a commitment to delivering high-quality service.



Benefits:

Permanent work-from-home (WFH) arrangement.

Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses.

Professional development opportunities.

Supportive and collaborative team environment.



How to Apply:

Interested candidates are invited to submit their resume and a cover letter detailing their experience and qualifications related to this position.



IMPORTANT: Include a link to your 2-minute introduction video. Describe your past experiences.

title: Video Editor for Meta Ads

 and Instagram). Our brand is in the food space, specifically ramen toppings and noodles.

title: Sales and Customer Retention Associate
description:
We're a US-based startup. Our mission is to help people learn new skills.



### What does success look like?



- You love helping prospects find what they're looking for. You're a motivated sales expert with a proven track record in B2C and B2B businesses.

- Provide phone and chat-based consultative selling in proficient English.

- Track success and implement process improvements to drive better results.



Requirements for the role:



- Both Saturday and Sunday shift availability (PST Time-zone) for up to 10 hours per day (you will still have 2 rest days a week, working 5 days/week)

- Competency in GoHighLevel or history of using other Outbound Calling/Lead Platforms.

- Comfort in a growing and changing environment.

- 3+ Customer Support Experience

- 4+ years of sales experience





---



### What you get



This is an opportunity to work closely with a world-class team for a venture-backed company on something that's truly exciting and trend-setting. This is high-impact work. It means something. You will get exposure in every aspect of the business, product, consumer technology and startup life. You will have thought-provoking conversations with the team, our investors, advisors and users.



Not to mention:



- Competitive salary

- Remote working



Full time role. Up to 45 hours per week coverage, 5 days per week.
